 In our NOBAVERSE, we value openness, trust, and diversity. Here, you can influence your own development and have fun along the way to achieving our goals – all in a workplace that’s a little extra
 *bubbly* 
 ! ✨
   

  

 Read more about our employee value proposition on our careers page.
   

  

**Read more about how our recruitment process works in the** 
**FAQ** 
**.**
 We care for your privacy and, with reference to the GDPR, would like to ask you not to include any sensitive personal data in your application, for examples information about ethnic origin, political opinions, religious beliefs or information about your health.
   

  

**Read more about how we handle your personal data** 
**here** 
**.**
 If you have any questions or concerns about the position, please contact the responsible recruiter.
   

  

 We look forward to receiving your application! 🙏✨

title: Network Technician – 3rd level support
description:
Are you excited by the newest developments in the field of network technology? Do you aspire to be part of a team that delivers the next generation of secure, high-performance networks to enterprise customers across the Nordics? If so, this opportunity is tailor-made for you!
   

  

**About The Role**
 As a Network Technician at GlobalConnect, you'll be joining a Pan-Nordic team responsible for 3rd level operations where we are supporting the future of B2B and B2G network solutions. You will be part of a growing business that offers exposure to innovative technologies and provides a steep learning curve.
   

  

 In this role, you'll focus on troubleshooting and maintaining critical network systems while also working on advanced SD-WAN, firewall, and WiFi platforms like Fortinet, HPE Aruba, and Versa Networks. You will have the unique opportunity to handle 3rd-level operations, ensuring the ongoing performance of one of Europe’s largest and most complex ISP networks.
   

  

**Here are some examples of key responsibilities during a typical day:**
* Collaborating with our Network Operations and Engineering teams to manage and resolve incidents and escalations.
* Maintaining Layer 2/3 network systems and overseeing SD-WAN services (Underlay, Overlay, Add-On).


 Alongside these responsibilities, you will continuously observe the network's performance, resolve advanced issues, handle alterations in system configuration, and maintain consistent operations to provide continuous service to our clients. You’ll also keep documentation up-to-date and train local Customer Service departments to strengthen their knowledge.
   

  

**Why join us?**
 At GlobalConnect, your work entails more than network upkeep; you'll be contributing to innovative advancements. The role provides a platform to interact with up-and-coming technologies set in a lively and quick-tempo scene, where you'll join forces with a closely connected team that excels through collaboration. You’ll participate in exciting projects that let you expand your expertise in software-defined networks and gain hands-on experience with advanced security solutions for large-scale networks.
   

  

 We value your development and will provide training to ensure you stay at the forefront of the industry. Your contributions will directly impact public and private sector clients, making you an essential part of our mission to provide high-stability connectivity.
   

  

**To Succeed In This Role, We Believe You Have**
* Deep expertise in Fortinet technologies, including FortiGate FW/SD-WAN routers, FortiExtender 4G/5G modems, FortiSwitch, and FortiAP WiFi APs.
* Solid experience with TCP/IP, Routing & Switching, and SD-WAN services such as Underlay, Overlay, and Add-On.
* Experience with platforms such as Versa and Aruba.
* Familiarity with ITIL and tools like ServiceNow, JIRA, and MS Teams.
* Fluency in English (both written and spoken) to effectively communicate across our Pan-Nordic team and with customers.


**A security clearance is required for this position, so it is important that you can be approved in the country you're applying for.**
**Excited to take the next step?**
 We are looking for someone who is motivated by the opportunity of working with complex, large-scale networks and is excited about the prospect of becoming an expert in secure overlay networks. If you are interested in making a difference in how enterprises and governments stay connected, we want to hear from you!
   

  

 If you’re excited about this opportunity but don’t meet every single requirement, don’t worry! We’d still love to hear from you.
   

  

 No need for a personal letter – just send us your CV or LinkedIn profile.
   

  

**About Us**
 GlobalConnect is one of the leading connectivity providers in Northern Europe. We’re 2000 passionate and talented individuals who want to make a difference, turning our customers’ visions into reality through connectivity. Our goal is to create the best possible conditions for engaged employees, a place where you can develop and grow, and create unforgettable memories and enjoyable experiences.
   

  

 We have helped develop and digitize societies across the Nordics for more than two decades. Our purpose is what drives us to continue - turning visions into reality by empowering society with connectivity.

title: Technical Architect
description:
Vi söker en Microsoft Infrastructure
 *Technical Architect till* 
 Advanias specialistenhet Knowledge Factory!
   

  

*Brinner du för innovativa lösningar? Är du en naturlig ledare som får med dig dina kollegor och kunder? Vänder sig kunder till dig när de behöver stöd och hjälp? Vi behöver din hjälp för att kunna leverera de bästa tekniska och strategiska lösningarna.*
 Technical Architect på Advania-KF 🚀
   

  

 Rollen är baserad i Sverige och du rapporterar direkt till en av våra Captains. Vårt team präglas av ödmjukhet, samverkan och vi är blixtsnabba till förändring.
   

  

 Specialistenheten Knowledge Factory på Advania har några av de vassaste experterna på marknaden inom olika områden. Vi jobbar i små team och alltid nära kunden.
   

  

 Som Technical Architect, TA, är du del av området Solutions som spänner över våra teknikområden såsom Identity, Devices, Modern Work, Datacenter, Integration Platform med flera. Du arbetar med och utvecklar de lösningar som levereras av våra Technical Architects gällande kvalitet, innovation och effektivitet.
   

  

 I din roll har du möjlighet att bygga relationer och leverera tekniska och strategiska lösningar som skapar värde för kundens verksamhet. Du har god relation med våra kunder och du träffar dem ofta.
   

  

 Du arbetar aktivt med omvärldsbevakning och är väl insatt i ny teknik inom ditt specialistområde. Din uppgift handlar om att ha god förståelse för Advanias erbjudande och kunna matcha våra kunders behov med rätt kompetens från Advania.
   

  

**Som Technical Architect förväntar vi oss att du:**
* agerar Trusted Advisor och bygger långsiktiga relationer med våra kunder
* driver området Solutions för våra kunder
* ansvarar för och medverkar i hela leveransen eller specifika delar, ofta i större projekt, samt säkerställer god kvalitet
* interagerar direkt med beslutsfattare på ledningsnivå och vägleder dem med de bästa tekniska lösningarna och strategierna
* driver workshops och utbildningar


 Vad vi söker hos dig ✨
   

  

 Vi söker dig som har tung erfarenhet i branschen. Du har erfarenhet som konsult och är van att sätta dig in i nya miljöer och utmaningar. Du har en bred kompetens som spänner över flera teknikområden och har djup teknisk förståelse inom ett eller flera områden.
   

  

 Du är:
   

  

  

* bekväm med att driva dialog, förstå behov och utmaningar och arbeta nära kunderna på deras resa mot att modernisera sina plattformar.
* en kreativ och tydlig person som kan påvisa hur tekniska lösningar möter behov och levererar affärsnytta för ledning, IT och verksamhet.
* ansvarstagande, affärsdriven och motiveras av att nå resultat och skapa långsiktiga kundrelationer
* trygg i miljöer med kompetenta kollegor där du både utmanar och utmanas.


 Du delar gärna med dig av det du brinner för genom bloggar eller att hålla seminarier. Du är ett namn på marknaden med ett brett kontaktnät och förmågan att växa vår affär genom att identifiera nya möjligheter hos kund.
   

  

**Vad vi erbjuder dig ☀️**
 Här på Knowledge Factory får du utmanande arbetsuppgifter, ett sammansvetsat team och möjligheter att utvecklas inom några av våra kunders vassaste projekt. Vi ser gärna att du delar din kunskap genom seminarier och blogginlägg – du blir en del av vår attraktionskraft mot marknaden.
   

  

 Det är viktigare för oss att du är rätt person, nyfiken och villig att lära, än att du uppfyller alla kvalifikationer från start.  Vi stöttar dig och vill utvecklas tillsammans med dig och våra kunder!
   

  

 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan! 👋
   

  

 Visa gärna ditt intresse så snart som möjligt då vi intervjuar löpande. Vi välkomnar sökanden med olika bakgrunder, erfarenheter och synsätt, eftersom vi vet att en bredare mångfald berikar var och en av oss och stärker såväl effektivitet som kreativitet i vårt arbete.
   

  

 Som en del av vår rekryteringsprocess genomgår våra slutkandidater en obligatorisk bakgrundskontroll, en för oss kvalitativ kontroll inför ett anställningsbeslut. Advania samarbetar även med Ljung & Sjöberg för en proaktiv arbetsplats kopplat till alkohol och droger.
   

  

 Tveka inte att höra av dig om du har några frågor eller funderingar.
   

  

 Det är du som arbetar nära kunden som vet vad dem behöver och vad som blir den bästa lösningen för just deras unika behov, både i dag och i morgon. Därför tycker vi att det är du som ska fatta besluten. Det är genom att erbjuda säkra, hållbara och kundanpassade lösningar som vi skapar värde för kunderna och samhället i stort.
   

  

 Vi bryr oss om hur våra medarbetare mår – på riktigt. Därför samarbetar Advania med Ljung & Sjöberg för att skapa en trygg, proaktiv arbetsmiljö med stöd kring alkohol-, drog- och beroenderelaterade frågor. Tillsammans bygger vi en hållbar arbetsplats där det är okej att be om hjälp, och där förebyggande arbete gör skillnad – för individen, teamet och företaget.
   

  

 I en miljö präglad av stort kundfokus och frihet under ansvar blir det extra viktigt för oss att bygga starka team bestående av ödmjuka stjärnor. Att arbeta i en inkluderande miljö, med kollegor och kunder som vill utvecklas, ger oss möjligheten att trivas och ha riktigt roligt på jobbet. Vi tror på en platt organisation med agilt arbetssätt och flexibilitet. Detta är det enda sättet för en hållbar framtid.
   

  

 Advania Sverige, ”The tech company with people at heart”, har kontor över hela landet, från Luleå i norr till Malmö i syd. Dagligen hjälper våra 1 700 specialister våra kunder, både inom privat och offentlig sektor, i deras ambitioner och mål att digitalisera sina verksamheter. Genom långsiktiga relationer, ledande teknologier, moderna plattformslösningar och strategiska partnerskap formar vi framtidens IT-landskap. Vårt syfte sträcker sig bortom teknik: att ge människor kraften att skapa hållbara värden.
   

  

 Advaniagruppen levererar tjänster till kunder i Sverige, Norge, Storbritannien, Island, Finland och Danmark inom hållbar och säker digitalisering.

title: DIGITAL ANALYST
description:
**Digital Analyst – E-commerce performance**
 Scandinavian Airlines (SAS) is looking for a Digital Analyst to strengthen our Digital Sales organization and support the continuous optimization of our e-commerce performance. As part of SAS’s broader digital transformation, this role will play a key part in enabling a more data-driven, insight-led commercial organization.
   

  

 You will work at the intersection of business, data, and technology, helping e-commerce teams understand performance, identify opportunities, and make better decisions across the digital customer journey. This includes delivering actionable insights, improving tracking and reporting foundations, attribution models, and supporting experimentation and optimization initiatives across web, app, and marketing channels.
   

  

 This role is suited for someone who enjoys hands-on analysis, working close to the business, and collaborating across functions in a fast-paced digital environment, with the opportunity to shape how data is used to drive commercial impact, at scale.
   

  

**Challenges you will work on**
* Turning large volumes of digital and e‑commerce data into clear, actionable insights that support day‑to‑day decision making
* Understanding and optimizing complex customer journeys across multiple touchpoints and channels
* Ensuring high-quality tracking and data reliability across digital platforms, in collaboration with product, digital, and IT teams
* Balancing ad‑hoc insight requests with recurring reporting needs in a fast-paced environment
* Supporting teams in becoming more data self-sufficient through improved dashboards and reporting solutions
* Helping stakeholders interpret performance correctly and avoid misreading metrics or attribution results
* Working in a test‑and‑learn culture where experimentation, iteration, and learning from failures are encouraged
* Exploring how AI and automation can streamline recurring reporting and free up time for higher-value analysis


**Key Responsibilities**
* Analyze e‑commerce performance with a focus on conversion rate (CR) and cost per acquisition (CPA)
* Deliver regular reports and ad‑hoc analyses to e‑commerce managers and other stakeholders
* Conduct funnel, journey, and behavioral analyses to identify optimization opportunities
* Support campaign and attribution analysis together with paid media and performance teams
* Enable and improve self-service reporting using Google Analytics and related tools
* Verify, implement, and troubleshoot tracking using Google Tag Manager
* Support setup, analysis, and follow‑up of A/B tests and experiments
* Collaborate closely with e‑commerce, product, digital, and IT teams to align measurement and insights with business needs
* Contribute to maintaining and evolving existing KPIs, and support the definition of new ones when needed
* Identify and implement opportunities to automate recurring reports and data workflows, reducing manual effort across the team Explore and test AI-assisted tools and methods to enhance analysis, reporting efficiency, and insight generation


**The Team**
 You’ll join a growing Digital Sales team within eCommerce, responsible for driving digital revenue through performance marketing, optimization of our web and app channels, SEO/SEM, and data-driven analytics. We work closely with Digital/IT, Brand & Marketing, Partnerships, Inflight, and Analytics, and the wider Commercial organization to deliver aligned, high-impact initiatives. Together, we’re building a modern and scalable digital ecosystem that supports SAS’s global commercial goals.
   

  

**To be successful, we believe you have**
* Experience working hands-on with Google Analytics and a good understanding of core e‑commerce metrics
* The ability to analyze data and translate it into clear insights that support business decisions
* Basic experience with SQL and a willingness to continue developing your technical skills
* Hands-on experience with A/B testing and an understanding of experimentation principles
* Confidence working with tracking and tagging, especially using Google Tag Manager
* A pragmatic, problem‑solving mindset and enjoyment in digging into details when needed
* Strong collaboration skills and the ability to work with multiple stakeholders across different teams
* Openness to feedback, learning, and experimenting in a fast-paced, “fail fast” environment
* Good communication skills, enabling you to explain data and insights to both technical and non-technical audiences
* Exposure to BI or visualization tools such as Looker, Power BI, or similar


**It’s a Plus If You Also Have**
* Experience working with BigQuery or other cloud-based data warehouses
* Familiarity with experimentation or CRO tools (e.g. Optimizely, VWO, or similar)
* Basic knowledge of Python or R for data analysis or automation
* Experience working with attribution models or media performance analysis
* Previous experience in e‑commerce, travel, or large-scale digital environments
* Interest in continuously improving how data, tracking, and insights are used across teams
* Experience using AI tools to supported data analysis, documentation, or reporting workflows
* Interests in automation of data pipelines or report generation using Python, SQL scheduling, or BI tool features


**Why SAS?**
 At SAS, we offer extensive opportunities for professional development in an international, fast-paced working environment. We are dedicated to the continuous growth of our employees. Working with us comes with a variety of benefits, including:
   

  

* Travel Perks: Enjoy discounted travel opportunities around the world with SAS.
* Health & Wellness: Access to health and wellness benefits, including a newly renovated gym with complimentary classes such as CrossFit and yoga.
* Discounts: Receive discounts from a wide range of brands, as well as on transportation to and from airports, airport shops, hotels, and car rentals.
* Work Environment: Our office location in Frösundavik offers a vibrant workspace with a restaurant, café, and easy access to outdoor activities in Hagaparken and Brunnsviken. Engage in running, tennis, outdoor gym sessions, kayaking, and stand-up paddling with equipment available free of charge.
* Convenient Commute: Benefit from a non-stop bus service connecting our office to Solna station, and commuter trains, alongside a network of cycle paths.


**Our Culture at SAS**
 At SAS, we are dedicated to caring for each other, delighting our travelers, and driving the transformation towards sustainable aviation. As a future colleague on our team, you’ll join a culture where we work collaboratively towards common goals, recognize each other's contributions, and celebrate successes. Our focus is on safe, sustainable, and punctual execution, and we are committed to protecting our planet while transforming SAS for the future. This is an empowering workplace where you can thrive, grow, and take ownership of your work. Join us at SAS and be part of shaping the future of aviation!
   

  

**Additional Information**
* Deadline for application: 29/05/2026. Please send us your CV as soon as possible, as interviews are conducted continuously, and the position may be filled before the application deadline. Note that we are not able to handle any applications that are sent by email, due to GDPR regulations.
* Desired start date: As soon as possible.
* Position: Fulltime (100%) starting with a 6-month probation period.
* This position is based in Frösundavik, Solna (Stockholm), and you will be expected to work onsite. Remote work may also be an option, depending on the agreement made with your manager.


 Come and fly with us!

title: Data Scientist, Consumer
description:
**About Wolt**
 At Wolt, we create technology that brings joy, simplicity and earnings to the neighborhoods of the world. In 2014 we started with delivery of restaurant food. Now we’re building the delivery of (almost) everything and you’ll find us in over 500 cities in 30 countries around the world. In 2022 we joined forces with DoorDash and together we keep on dreaming big and expanding across the globe.
   

  

 Working at Wolt isn’t always easy, but it’s definitely exciting. Here you’ll learn more, build more, and ship more than in most other companies. You’ll be challenged a lot, but also have a lot of fun on the way. So, if you’re a self-starter with drive and entrepreneurial spirit, this could be the ride of your life.
   

  

**About Consumer Analytics At Wolt**
 The team partners closely with Wolt's product organization and business partners to make sure the right insights reach the right people at the right time, building a culture where data is a natural part of how we work, not a bottleneck or an afterthought.
   

  

 The Core Experience team sits at the heart of this, covering the full customer journey from opening the app to completing an order – browsing, search, in-venue experience, cart and checkout. Data Scientists here work hand in hand with product teams, combining rigorous experimentation with sharp business judgment to move fast without sacrificing confidence.
   

  

**About The Consumer Data Science Team**
 The team partners closely with Wolt's product organization and business partners to make sure the right insights reach the right people at the right time, building a culture where data is a natural part of how we work, not a bottleneck or an afterthought.
   

  

 The Core Experience team sits at the heart of this, covering the full customer journey from opening the app to completing an order – browsing, search, in-venue experience, cart and checkout. Data Scientists here work hand in hand with product teams, combining rigorous experimentation with sharp business judgment to move fast without sacrificing confidence.
   

  

 What you’ll be doing
   

  

 As a Data Scientist at Wolt, your role involves diving into our data to solve crucial business problems. The scope of this role ranges from diagnosing problem areas to identifying solutions to designing experiments and ultimately influencing decision-making. This is a rare, operational and actionable data-driven experience that requires a good mix of technical and stakeholder engagement skills. When you join this team, you will be driving action from the frontlines, rather than just doing yet another analytics or data science role. Data Scientists at Wolt take ownership of the business outcomes.
   

  

 If you enjoy finding patterns amidst the chaos, are excited to build from 0 to 1, and have experience using data science skills to solve business problems, we're looking for someone like you.
   

  

 Our humble expectations
   

  

* 3+ years of experience in an analytics or data science position
* Experience working with product funnels and user journeys
* Proficiency in SQL and Python
* Hands-on experience in designing and analysing A/B testing
* Experience in using AI in your work to accelerate work velocity, automate repetitive tasks, and generate SQL queries and experiment readouts
* Prior experience building intuitive data visualizations and dashboards that influence business decisions, utilizing tools like Tableau, Mixpanel, Looker, or similar


 What we offer
   

  

* The online delivery platform that Wolt is building will offer you interesting and complex challenges, together with the opportunities to create a big impact with your skills. Lots of geolocational and temporal data in real-time, combined with differences in the economics and dynamics of the cities we operate in, make Wolt both a challenging and interesting company to practice analytics!
* You have the chance to decide the ways of working: hybrid, at the office, or remote within Stockholm or Helsinki. 💙
* You would get to work in a company culture where we take ownership beyond the obvious, do common things uncommonly well, we think big but stay humble, do right by people, we treat others kindly and justly, recognize that if we don’t learn, we won’t stay still but fall behind and keep in mind that Luke was Yoda’s greatest achievement.


 Next steps
   

  

 The position will be filled as soon as we find the right person, so make sure to apply as soon as you realize you really, really want to join us!
   

  

 For any further questions about the position, you can turn to Senior Talent Acquisition Partner - Zhanna Filintseva via zhanna.filintseva@wolt.com
   

  

 Our Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion
   

  

 We’re committed to growing and empowering a more inclusive community within our company, industry, and cities. That’s why we hire and cultivate diverse teams of people from all backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives. We believe that true innovation happens when everyone has room at the table and the tools, resources, and opportunity to excel.

title: Onsite tekniker med Teamlead ansvar
description:
Teamleader till Onsite på Advania
   

  

**För dig som vill kombinera teknisk tyngd med inflytande i vardagen.**
 Som Onsite-tekniker är du en nyckelperson hos kund och ser till att IT-miljön fungerar i vardagen. Du arbetar hands-on med felsökning, användarstöd och hantering av både planerade och akuta ärenden. Din tekniska kompetens är central – du är trygg i Active Directory, Windows-miljöer och Microsoft 365 och bidrar med förbättringsförslag utifrån din erfarenhet.
   

  

 Det är en roll där dina ledaregenskaper får ta plats i en operativ miljö och du leder genom att vara en del av leveransen, samtidigt som du skapar struktur och stöttar teamet i vardagen. Det är ditt ansvar att planera beredskap och semester, samt fungera som en förlängd arm till konsultchefen i leveransnära frågor och du ingår själv i beredskapen. Du representerar teamet i dialog med kund och säkerställer tydlighet och goda samarbeten.
   

  

 Det här är en roll för dig som vill påverka, skapa struktur och bidra till utveckling utan formellt personalansvar, lönesättning eller medarbetarsamtal. Du leder med närvaro, samarbete och gott omdöme och skapar förutsättningar för att teamet ska lyckas tillsammans.
   

  

 Är det dig vi letar efter?✨
   

  

 Vi söker dig som är en erfaren och trygg Onsite tekniker med flera års arbete i professionella IT-miljöer, gärna i kundnära eller konsultativa sammanhang. För att lyckas i rollen ser vi att du:
   

  

  

* har erfarenhet av Active Directory, Windows klient- och servermiljöer samt Microsoft 365
* har en stabil grund inom nätverk, servermiljöer och klienthårdvara
* är van att arbeta självständigt, fatta beslut i vardagen och driva ärenden hela vägen till lösning
* har erfarenhet av att samordna arbete i team, stötta andra tekniskt eller fungera som operativ ledare utan formellt chefsansvar
* Erfarenhet av Intune och Jamf är meriterande.


 Minst lika viktigt som teknisk kompetens är hur du arbetar. Du kommunicerar tydligt och respektfullt, bygger förtroende i relationer och trivs i samarbete. Du leder genom att vara närvarande, lösningsorienterad och strukturerad, och genom att skapa trygghet för både kollegor och kund.
   

  

 Du uttrycker dig obehindrat på svenska och engelska i tal och skrift.
   

  

 Är det här nästa steg i din karriär? 🚀
   

  

 Det här är en roll för dig som vill fortsätta arbeta nära tekniken och kunden, men som också vill ha inflytande över hur arbetet organiseras och levereras. Du får mandat att påverka, bidra och ta ansvar.
   

  

 Vi tror på hållbart ledarskap, tydligt självledarskap och på att goda leveranser skapas tillsammans. Känner du igen dig, välkommen med din ansökan
   

  

 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan! 👋
   

  

 Visa gärna ditt intresse redan nu för att inte gå miste om möjligheten att utforska denna roll. Vi kommer att göra det första urvalet efter storhelgerna och därefter behandlar vi ansökningar var efter de kommer in till oss. Vi välkomnar sökanden med olika bakgrunder, erfarenheter och synsätt, eftersom vi vet att en bredare mångfald berikar var och en av oss och stärker såväl effektivitet som kreativitet i vårt arbete.
   

  

 Som en del av vår rekryteringsprocess genomgår våra slutkandidater en obligatorisk bakgrundskontroll, en för oss kvalitativ kontroll inför ett anställningsbeslut. Advania samarbetar även med Ljung & Sjöberg för en proaktiv arbetsplats kopplat till alkohol och droger.
   

  

 Tveka inte att höra av dig om du har några frågor eller funderingar.
   

  

 Det är du som arbetar nära kunden som vet vad dem behöver och vad som blir den bästa lösningen för just deras unika behov, både i dag och i morgon. Därför tycker vi att det är du som ska fatta besluten. Det är genom att erbjuda säkra, hållbara och kundanpassade lösningar som vi skapar värde för kunderna och samhället i stort.
   

  

 Vi bryr oss om hur våra medarbetare mår – på riktigt. Därför samarbetar Advania med Ljung & Sjöberg för att skapa en trygg, proaktiv arbetsmiljö med stöd kring alkohol-, drog- och beroenderelaterade frågor. Tillsammans bygger vi en hållbar arbetsplats där det är okej att be om hjälp, och där förebyggande arbete gör skillnad – för individen, teamet och företaget.
   

  

 I en miljö präglad av stort kundfokus och frihet under ansvar blir det extra viktigt för oss att bygga starka team bestående av ödmjuka stjärnor. Att arbeta i en inkluderande miljö, med kollegor och kunder som vill utvecklas, ger oss möjligheten att trivas och ha riktigt roligt på jobbet. Vi tror på en platt organisation med agilt arbetssätt och flexibilitet. Detta är det enda sättet för en hållbar framtid.
   

  

 Advania Sverige, ”The tech company with people at heart”, har kontor över hela landet, från Luleå i norr till Malmö i syd. Dagligen hjälper våra 1 700 specialister våra kunder, både inom privat och offentlig sektor, i deras ambitioner och mål att digitalisera sina verksamheter. Genom långsiktiga relationer, ledande teknologier, moderna plattformslösningar och strategiska partnerskap formar vi framtidens IT-landskap. Vårt syfte sträcker sig bortom teknik: att ge människor kraften att skapa hållbara värden.
   

  

 Advaniagruppen levererar tjänster till kunder i Sverige, Norge, Storbritannien, Island, Finland och Danmark inom hållbar och säker digitalisering.

title: Scada Engineer
description:
**Systemingenjörer SCADA** 




 Med människor i fokus och rötter i traditionell automation är vi en av Sveriges ledande leverantörer av resurseffektiviserande system för energi, infra och industri. Vi tar ett helhetsansvar för både stora och mindre projekt med el, kraft och automation. Vi levererar även hela anläggningar där vi utöver våra automationslösningar tar ett totalansvar - människor, montagelösningar och mekanik. Genom att kombinera projektförmåga, branschkunnande och teknisk kompetens, skapar vi framgång och utveckling för både medarbetare och kunder. Våra resurser har vi samlade i eget hus vilket ger oss en värdefull samverkan och kontinuitet i projekten. För oss handlar projektförmåga om att skapa konkurrenskraft åt och tillsammans med våra kunder. Överallt där industriproduktion effektiviseras och utvecklas har Granitor Systems en naturlig och viktig roll att spela.
 



  





 Vill du ta nästa steg i din karriär och bidra till en grönare framtid? Som systemingenjörer SCADA en del av Granitor Systems, blir du en viktig del av ett kompetent och engagerat team. Vi arbetar med externa kunder inom energisektorn och strävar efter att skapa hållbara energilösningar för framtiden. Detta är en unik möjlighet att delta i uppdrag som påverkar Europas elmarknad, med fokus på innovation och energiomställning. Om du vill utveckla ett starkare, smartare och grönare energisystem – ansök nu! Vi välkomnar alla sökande, även om inte alla krav uppfylls, eftersom vi tror på mångfald och utveckling inom teamet.
 



  





**Dina arbetsuppgifter:** 




 I rollen som systemingenjör kommer du att arbeta med kundens SCADA-systemet. Arbetsuppgifterna innefattar bland annat databasunderhåll, Arbetsuppgifterna i detta uppdrag innebär att genomföra PTP-tester i labbmiljö. Teamet för PTP-tester kommer att bestå av en testledare från kunden. Kontinuerligt under projektets gång valideras migrerade data och bilder i syfte att säkerställa kvalitén. En viktig aktivitet under slutfasen av valideringsarbetet är punkt-till-punkt tester (PTP-tester). Dessa går ut på att testa fjärrhanterade objekt mellan kundens nätstationer och det nya systemet. Efterleva Granitor Systems värderingar om säkerhet och integritet, och bidra till en positiv arbetsmiljö.
 



  





**Bakgrund:** 



* Högskoleexamen med teknisk inriktning.
* Minst två års arbetslivserfarenhet av arbete med elkraft
* Minst ett års arbetslivserfarenhet av arbete med drift- och övervakningssystem (SCADA system).
* Minst ett års arbetslivserfarenhet av punkt-till-punkt tester eller andra strukturerade tester i SCADA-system eller andra industriella IT-system som vi bedömer som relevant.
* Minst ett års arbetslivserfarenhet av arbete med kontrollanläggning i nätstationer och/eller stations RTU (Remote Terminal Unit) och/eller kommunikation mellan nätstation och driftcentral.
* God skriftlig och muntlig kommunikationsförmåga på svenska och engelska



  





**Vad vi erbjuder:** 




 Kollektivavtal och flexibel arbetstid.
 



  





**Bra att veta:** 




**Placering:** 
 Stockholm Omfattning: heltidstjänst
 



  





**Säkerhetsprövning:** 
 Om anställningen avser befattning i säkerhetsklass kommer säkerhetsprövningen även att innefatta en registerkontroll och, i vissa fall, en särskild personutredning. För anställning hos oss kan det vara ett krav på
 **svenskt medborgarskap** 
 i vissa befattningar. Säkerhetsprövning av kandidaten kan komma att krävas!
 



  





**Beredskap/Jour:** 




 Beredskap eller jour kan innebära att du ingår i en beredskapsgruppering och har ansvar att vara tillgänglig under vissa tider. Hur ofta detta inträffar beror på hur många personer som ingår i teamet – ju fler personer, desto mer fördelas beredskapstiden.
 



  





**Kontaktperson:** 




 Siamak Hashemi (Gruppchef),
 
 siamak.hashemi@granitor.se
 




 Douglas Lowén douglas.lowen@granitor.se
 



**Rekryteringsprocess:** 




 Urval och intervjuer sker löpande så sök nu!

title: Technical Support Manager
description:
**We are hiring a Specialist Technical Support to join our team.**
**We are looking for you on a fixed-term contract as parental leave cover.**
**Let’s talk about the role:**
 The Technical Support Manager Sweden reports to the Nordics Technical Service Manager and is a key member of the Technical Services Department. The role is based on-site at the ResMed Swedish office in Kista and will support customers, internal teams, and distributors within the Swedish market.
   

  

**Position Description:**
 The primary purpose of this role is to provide high-quality technical and engineering support for ResMed products and 3pp products, both to customers and internal stakeholders. This includes ownership of customer queries, management of investigation of product failures, device upgrades, maintenance, testing, technical trainings and management of repairs. The Technical Services Manager also acts as the local QA/RA representative, ensuring regulatory compliance and device traceability throughout the product life cycle. Beyond the day-to-day operational responsibilities, this position plays a key role in representing the Swedish Technical Services function within
 **local, regional, and global meetings and projects** 
 . The successful candidate will actively participate in strategic and operational discussions, ensuring alignment with ResMed’s global service structure, processes, and long-term objectives. This includes contributing to continuous improvement initiatives, sharing local market insights, and supporting the implementation of new global service strategies in the Nordic region.
   

  

**Let’s talk about responsibilities:**
* Provide technical support to local customers via phone, email, and CRM tools (mandatory for tender participation).
* Manage troubleshooting, repair, returns, and replacement processes for sleep apnea devices, life support ventilators, and diagnostic devices, including non-serialized product handling.
* Deliver technical support to internal teams including sales, finance, and customer service.
* Act as the Local QA/RA SCHU representative, responsible for complaint handling, device traceability, and liaison with regulatory authorities and RCHU.
* Provide technical support to distributors in Sweden.
* Manage the aftersales online portal: create customer accounts and conduct user training sessions for hospital technical teams and distributors.
* Conduct technical training and manage re-certification processes for hospital staff (remote or on-site as required by tenders).
* Prepare and deliver technical documentation for tenders, including service manuals, quality certificates, and official tender forms in the local language.
* Manage loan devices, including shipment, return, and record-keeping.
* Drive continuous improvement initiatives: report KPIs, update OKRs, improve Net Promoter Score (NPS), and communicate customer needs to the sales team.
* Coordinate logistics and customs clearance paperwork for service devices.
* Perform other duties and responsibilities as assigned.
* Participate in regional, European and global meetings with the global technical teams.


**Let’s talk about qualifications and experience:**
**Required:**
* University degree in applied sciences,engineering or biomedical science.
* Native Swedish language skills and business-level English.
* Knowledge of measurement units and electronic components.
* Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook) and CRM tools.
* Strong communication skills, both written and verbal, with the ability to maintain professionalism and interact effectively with customers and stakeholders at all levels.
* Ability to engage with senior internal and external personnel and drive resolutions that align with company goals and objectives.


**Preferred:**
* Experience working within the hospital or healthcare sector.
* Minimum 2 years’ experience in a similar technical service role using a CRM system (e.g., Salesforce).
* Knowledge of the Swedish healthcare system and/or experience managing relationships with healthcare professionals.
* Hands-on experience in technical repair and/or daily service center operations.
* Familiarity with 5S, Lean, or Six Sigma methodologies.
* Knowledge of an additional Nordic language (Finnish, Norwegian, Danish).
* Proactive and self-driven
* Customer- and business-oriented mindset
* Comfortable with digital communication tools (phone, Zoom, Teams).
* Highly organized and detail oriented.
* Eager to challenge themselves and grow.
* Strong team player with a collaborative approach.


**Additional information :**
* At ResMed, all employees benefit from a bonus plan, the percentage of which depends on your position within the organisation
* You also have access to a referral bonus and to ResMed's preferred shareholding programme
* Internal career opportunity - joining an international fast-pace and massively growing company


**OK, so what's next?**
 Joining us is more than saying “yes” to making the world a healthier place. It’s discovering a career that’s challenging, supportive and inspiring. Where a culture driven by excellence helps you not only meet your goals, but also create new ones. We focus on creating a diverse and inclusive culture, encouraging individual expression in the workplace and thrive on the innovative ideas this generates. If this sounds like the workplace for you, apply now.
   

  

 Joining us is more than saying “yes” to making the world a healthier place. It’s discovering a career that’s challenging, supportive and inspiring. Where a culture driven by excellence helps you not only meet your goals, but also create new ones. We focus on creating a diverse and inclusive culture, encouraging individual expression in the workplace and thrive on the innovative ideas this generates. If this sounds like the workplace for you, apply now! We commit to respond to every applicant.

title: Business Analyst
description:
**We’ve signed up to an ambitious journey. Join us!**
*As Arrive, we guide customers and communities towards brighter futures and more livable cities, it isn’t a challenge just anyone could take on. Luckily, we have something to help us make it happen. Our people and our values. We Arrive Curious, Focused and Together. Just as our entire brand is inspired by the North Star, the shining light leading travelers to their destinations since time began, our values guide us. They help us be at our best. For our customers. For the cities and communities we serve. For ourselves. As a global team, we are transforming urban mobility. Let’s grow better, together.*
**The Role**
 Are you ready to tackle complex challenges and make a global impact? Join our Access Controlled Solutions team as a Business Analyst, where you'll play a vital role in shaping the next generation of parking solutions.
   

  

 In this role, you'll work with a variety of stakeholders—from camera provider partners and distribution teams to the product team—to ensure our solutions function seamlessly. You’ll dive deep into processes, identifying improvements, creating detailed documentation, and aligning multiple internal teams to provide a smooth user journey from start to finish. You will help streamline our access control solutions, from simplifying user flows to enabling scalable, automated processes that elevate the EasyPark experience.
   

  

 Our products within access controlled parking solve real-world parking challenges, enabling users to seamlessly enter and exit access-restricted areas via automatic license plate recognition and other access methods. With over 6 million vehicles opted in and millions of transactions processed monthly, we’re dedicated to creating a flawless experience for EasyPark users across the globe.
   

  

**How To Make An Impact**
* Work cross-functionally to optimize processes, facilitating smooth product launches and performance scaling as we aim to make this solution available to users worldwide
* Evaluating business processes, clarifying and anticipating requirements and uncovering areas for improvement
* You will help the Product Team by figuring out the tricky business details to ensure we build products that meet business and customer needs
* Analyze, evaluate, refine and document business processes and create new models that support the business
* Documenting features, functionalities and overall how products and services work on both a holistic and granular level
* Effectively communicating your insights and plans to cross-functional team members and management


**About You**
 Curiosity and an analytical mindset are essential to succeed in this role. You have a strong drive to understand complex, interwoven processes and can distill them into clear, actionable documentation for diverse stakeholders. You’re comfortable navigating a variety of challenges, balancing a big-picture perspective with an eye for detail. You excel at zooming in on the finer aspects of product flows while maintaining a holistic view of the overall experience.
   

  

**Your background**
* Experience: 1–3 years as a Business Analyst, Product Analyst, or in a related role, preferably within a technology, data, or product-focused environment
* Analytical Skills: Strong analytical abilities, with a knack for breaking down complex processes, identifying bottlenecks, and proposing actionable improvements
* Communication: Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English, capable of translating technical details into clear, understandable documentation for non-technical stakeholders
* Collaboration: A team player who thrives in cross-functional environments, with experience working alongside engineering, product, and business teams
* Process-Oriented: Comfortable working within complex workflows and adept at understanding and documenting detailed processes to drive efficiency and clarity.
* Language: Fluent in English, both written and verbal


 This role will ideally be based in Stockholm, however, we are open to considering candidates across the UK and Europe.
   

  

 Arrive, including brands like EasyPark, Flowbird, RingGo, ParkMobile and Parkopedia, is a leading global mobility platform. Present in over 90 countries and 20,000 cities, the company helps people and decision-makers make smarter decisions about urban mobility and ease the experience of travel worldwide. Arrive delivers a unique combination of the core ingredients to make cities more livable: from smart payments and optimized car parks to data-driven traffic reduction and support for reinvestment in public transport and green space. It’s about more than function, it’s about saving time and simplifying the experience of travel for everyone. Travel is more than a journey, it’s how you Arrive.

title: Account Specialist - Retail
description:
**About Wolt**
 At Wolt, we create technology that brings joy, simplicity and earnings to the neighborhoods of the world. In 2014 we started with delivery of restaurant food. Now we’re building the delivery of (almost) everything and you’ll find us in over 500 cities in 30 countries around the world. In 2022 we joined forces with DoorDash and together we keep on dreaming big and expanding across the globe.
   

  

 Working at Wolt isn’t always easy, but it’s definitely exciting. Here you’ll learn more, build more, and ship more than in most other companies. You’ll be challenged a lot, but also have a lot of fun on the way. So, if you’re a self-starter with drive and entrepreneurial spirit, this could be the ride of your life.
   

  

 At Wolt, we create technology that brings joy, simplicity and earnings to the neighborhoods of the world. In 2014 we started with delivery of restaurant food. Now we’re building the delivery of (almost) everything and you’ll find us in over 1000 cities in 30 countries around the world. In 2022 we joined forces with DoorDash and together we keep on dreaming big and expanding across the globe.
   

  

 Working at Wolt isn’t always easy, but it’s definitely exciting. Here you’ll learn more, build more, and ship more than in most other companies. You’ll be challenged a lot, but also have a lot of fun on the way. So, if you’re a self-starter with drive and entrepreneurial spirit, this could be the ride of your life.
   

  

**About The Role**
 At Wolt, we’re looking for an Account Specialist to join our Retail team - an exciting opportunity for someone with a few years of experience who’s ready to take ownership of their own portfolio and drive partner performance.
   

  

 In this role, you’ll independently manage and develop a portfolio of retail partners, focusing on improving performance, identifying growth opportunities, and building strong day-to-day relationships. You’ll use data to guide your decisions and play a key role in delivering results for both our partners and Wolt.
   

  

 If you enjoy working hands-on with partners, taking initiative, and turning insights into action, this could be the role for you.
   

  

 What you’ll be doing
   

  

**Day-to-day in this role you’ll:**
* Own and manage a portfolio of small and medium-sized retail partners on a day-to-day basis
* Monitor partner performance and take action to improve key metrics
* Prepare and lead regular check-ins with partners, sharing insights and actionable recommendations
* Identify opportunities to grow partner performance and execute on agreed actions
* Support partners in using Wolt tools such as campaigns, promotions, and ads effectively
* Work cross-functionally with Marketing, Operations, and Support to solve partner needs
* Plan and execute campaigns together with partners to drive orders and engagement
* Use data to track results and adjust your approach based on what works
* Proactively suggest ways to improve partner visibility and performance on the platform
* Contribute to team initiatives and support less experienced team members when relevant


 Our humble expectations
   

  

* 1–3 years of experience in account management, sales, or another partner-facing role in a fast-paced environment
* Fluent in Swedish and English, with the ability to communicate clearly and adapt your message to different audiences
* Comfortable working independently, while knowing when to seek guidance or escalate when needed
* Strong relationship-building skills, with a natural ability to connect with partners and colleagues
* Analytical mindset, with the ability to turn data into simple, actionable insights
* Structured and detail-oriented, with strong follow-through
* Proactive and hands-on - you take initiative and get things done
* Collaborative and team-oriented, with a willingness to share knowledge and support others
* Experience in retail, e-commerce, or FMCG is a plus


 What we offer
   

  

 This is a great opportunity to take the next step in your account management career, with more ownership and responsibility for your own portfolio.
   

  

 You’ll work in a collaborative and fast-paced environment, where you’ll continue to develop your commercial and analytical skills, while gaining experience that prepares you for more senior roles over time.
   

  

 Psst…We also offer breakfast every monday, “Friday Fika” and plenty of after work’s to socialise with your new colleagues!
   

  

 Why you’ll love it
   

  

* 🚀 A fast-growing company: Be part of an ambitious, international team
* 🤩 A strong learning environment: Develop your commercial and relationship-building skills from day one
* 💪 Real impact: Take ownership and see the results of your work
* 💙 Great team culture: Work with smart, friendly, and supportive colleagues


 Next steps
   

  

 If you are excited about working in a high-growth environment, taking ownership, and being part of an extremely ambitious team, then click below to apply, make sure to add your CV and get the conversation going!
   

  

 We will be reviewing applications on an on-going basis. If this sounds like an opportunity you want to pursue, apply today! 💙
   

  

 Our Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion
   

  

 We’re committed to growing and empowering a more inclusive community within our company, industry, and cities. That’s why we hire and cultivate diverse teams of people from all backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives. We believe that true innovation happens when everyone has room at the table and the tools, resources, and opportunity to excel.

title: Senior Data Engineer
description:
**Company Description** 




 BAPON Technologies is a trailblazing IT consulting firm dedicated to empowering businesses through intelligent automation, seamless digital integration, cloud transformation, and IT strategy. Recognized for upholding excellence with Cyber Essential Plus, ISO 9001, and ISO 27001 certifications, BAPON provides reliable and innovative solutions tailored to the evolving needs of startups and emerging companies. Leveraging cutting-edge technologies like AI, machine learning, and robotic process automation, the company enhances operational efficiency while driving growth and innovation. Additionally, BAPON is developing SkillfulSense, an advanced AI-powered platform designed to help users assess and develop their skills efficiently.
 



  





**Role Description** 




 We are looking for a Senior Data Engineer Consultant to take technical ownership of a modern Data Hub platform built on Microsoft Fabric.
 



  





 This is an opportunity to join a small, highly autonomous team focused on building scalable and production-ready data platforms that support data-driven products and business decisions across the organization.
 



  





**About the Assignment** 




 You will play a central role in designing, developing, and operating a modern lakehouse architecture using Microsoft Fabric and Azure technologies. The environment is cloud-native, engineering-driven, and focused on high-quality, reliable data solutions.
 



 The assignment includes:
 


* Building and maintaining Bronze → Silver → Gold lakehouse architecture
* Developing scalable data pipelines and transformation frameworks
* Implementing data quality, monitoring, and observability mechanisms
* Working with event-driven integrations and real-time ingestion patterns
* Supporting production-grade deployments and platform operations
* Collaborating closely with product teams, analysts, and stakeholders



  





**Required Experience** 




 We are looking for someone who has:
 


* Strong hands-on experience with PySpark, Spark SQL, and Delta Lake
* Experience working with Microsoft Fabric and/or Azure Databricks in production environments
* Solid experience with Azure Synapse and modern Azure Data Platform solutions
* Experience with CI/CD pipelines and version control using GitHub Actions
* Strong understanding of data products, domain ownership, and operating data pipelines in production
* Solid knowledge of data modelling and database design
* Experience working in cross-functional and agile teams
* A self-driven and communicative approach to engineering work
* Experience with event-driven architectures and real-time ingestion patterns
* *(Experience with Event Hubs is considered a strong advantage)*



  





**Meritorious Skills** 




 It is considered a plus if you also have experience with:
 


* Streaming architectures and real-time data processing
* Security, compliance, and access control within modern data platforms
* Technical documentation of data flows, pipelines, and architecture

title: Data Engineer
description:
*Kreditz is transforming how businesses assess credit and risk using real-time data and NextGen Credit Scoring solutions.*
*As one of Europe’s fastest-growing FinTech scaleups - we’ve earned a place on the* 
***Sifted 100: Nordics & Benelux***
*list in both 2024 and 2025 and most recently, we were proud to receive a* 
***double win at the Credit Management & Compliance Awards 2025***
*, being named both "* 
***Fintech Rocket of the Year***
*" and "* 
***Breakthrough of the Year***
*".*
*With strong growth across the Nordics and Europe, our clients range from leading banks and iGaming giants to fast-moving digital innovators.*
**About The Position**
*At Kreditz, data is not just a support function, it is the core of our product. We turn raw bank transactions into real-time insight that powers credit & risk decisions across Europe.*
*As we scale, we’re strengthening our data foundation and building a modern, reliable, and cost-efficient data platform. We’re now looking for a Data Engineer to join our Product team and take ownership of our Data Warehouse, pipelines, and reporting enablement across the business.*
*This is a hands-on role for someone who loves building scalable data infrastructure and wants to work close to both product and real business impact.*
*Your mission is to build and evolve a scalable, reliable, and high-performing data environment that supports both analytics and operational needs.*
**What Can Kreditz Offer**
* A once-in-a-lifetime growth journey, from startup to Global scaleup
* A journey where everyone in the team plays a crucial role for our company’s success
* Fun-loving, driven, and passionate colleagues who support each other’s success
* A culture that celebrates progress, humility, and teamwork
* We win together
* 24/7 access to gym, sauna and sports facilities at our office, plus additional wellness allowance
* Competitive base salary


**RESPONSIBILITES**
**Some Of The Main Responsibilities You Will Cover**
* Maintain & Enhance the DWH: Own the architecture of our Data Warehouse, ensuring it is scalable, cost-effective, and optimized for both analytical and operational needs.
* Pipeline Automation: Design, build, and maintain robust ETL/ELT pipelines to ingest data from various sources into our AWS ecosystem. Work closely with our MLOPs Engineering team to assist the data pipelines for our AI / ML models
* Stakeholder Enablement: Work closely with Product, Finance, and Commercial teams to automate internal reporting and create self-service data environments.
* AWS Infrastructure: Leverage and manage AWS services (such as Glue, Redshift, Athena, Lambda, and S3) to ensure a high-performing data environment.
* Data Quality & Governance: Implement monitoring and validation frameworks to ensure data integrity and lineage across all systems.
* Collaborate: Partner with our DevOps and Backend teams to align infrastructure and ensure smooth data flow across the entire Kreditz platform.


**WE ARE LOOKING FOR**
 We focus on practical engineering skill, strong foundations, and the ability to build systems that last.
   

  

**In Addition To That We Believe You Have**
* BSc / MSc in a quantitative subject, i.e., Physics, Engineering, Mathematics, Computer Science or equivalent.
* 3+ years of experience in Data Engineering or a similar role focused on data infrastructure.
* Expert-level SQL skills for complex transformations and performance tuning.
* Proficiency in Python for building pipelines and automating tasks.
* Strong hands-on experience with AWS (specifically services like Redshift/Snowflake, S3, Glue, and Lambda).
* Solid understanding of data warehousing concepts (e.g., Star Schema, Kimball) and modern data stack tools.
* Experience with orchestration tools (e.g., Airflow, Dagster) and CI/CD workflows (i.e., GitHub Actions).
* Ability to translate complex technical data structures into clear insights for non-technical stakeholders.


**Meritorious Skills**
* Experience with Infrastructure as Code (Terraform).
* Experience from FinTech, Open Banking, or working with highly regulated data.
* Familiarity with BI tools (e.g., AWS QuickSight, PowerBI...etc)


**WHY JOIN NOW?**
 At Kreditz, you’ll work with data that matters, powering real-time financial decisions across Europe. You’ll have real ownership, real impact, and the opportunity to shape the data foundation of a fast-growing FinTech scaleup.
   

  

**APPOINTMENT OF ROLE**
 Q2/Q3 2026
   

  

**SCOPE**
 Full-time, permanent employment (tillsvidareanställning)
   

  

**SALARY**
 Competitive salary
   

  

**REPORTING**
 You will be reporting to the company’s CPO
   

  

**WORKPLACE**
 Danderyd, Stockholm
   

  

**RECRUITMENT PROCESS**
 Ongoing selection, we review candidates continuously.
   

  

*Last day for applications 31st March*
**CRIMINAL RECORDS EXTRACT**
 As part of our recruitment process we will ask you to present a clean criminal records extract
   

  

**CONTACT**
 Lorenzo Puccio, VP Strategic Operations, Lorenzo@kreditz.com
   

  

 For more information about the role feel free to reach out to our CPO, Spilios Tzouras, spilios.tzouras@kreditz.com
   

  

 Intelligent credit- & risk decisions made easy with open banking & AI-technology

title: Head of Business Applications
description:
**Join us!** 




 We’re always happy to hear from people who are eager to learn and grow, and share our values. Read more about the role and apply by 1.6.2026
 



  





**About The Role** 




 Futurice has just completed a multi-year transformation of its operational systems landscape. As we transition from project mode to a steady-state operating capability, we are looking for a senior leader to take full ownership of our platform.
 



  





 As an AI and Data first business, we expect our Operations function to lead by example. As the Head of Business Applications, you will make Futurice operate as an AI-native company internally using automation and agentic AI to remove friction, surface real-time insights, and allow us to operate at a higher velocity than our size alone would suggest.
 



 You actively use AI tools in your daily work and know how to apply them to business operations pragmatically. You have a bias for velocity and prefer agile, frequent improvements over "big-bang" programs, balancing speed with quality and cost. We hope that you translate effortlessly between business stakeholders, architects, and external partners, even when making decisions with imperfect information. In addition, you are commercially driven and view licensing and vendor relationships as strategic levers, not administrative tasks.
 



 You bring a senior leadership perspective and your mission and first-year priorities would be to establish the operating model and define governance, intake processes, and vendor management to move us cleanly into a sustainable "run-and-evolve" mode. You translate platform investments into measurable business outcomes like improved sales velocity, staffing utilization, and project margin visibility. Additionally, you make Operations AI-native by building a portfolio of AI use cases (e.g., Agentforce, Claude-style assistants) that reduce manual work and put insights directly into the hands of our leadership.
 



 Reports to: Chief Operating Officer (COO)
 



 Location: One of our offices in Helsinki, Stockholm, or Munich (hybrid). Occasional travel to other Futurice locations. Please kindly note that, at this time, we are unable to offer relocation opportunities, or we will need to be highly selective in considering such requests.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




 In this position you
 


* Take end-to-end accountability for Salesforce, Certinia, and NetSuite (operational). You’ll own the roadmap, architecture, and budget while balancing technical debt with business growth.
* Lead governance forums to prioritize demand across sales, finance, and delivery. You’ll act as a strategic translator between technical trade-offs and executive goals.
* Lead and grow the in-house team while executing a "make-or-buy" strategy for external partners and managed services.
* Drive the internal AI agenda (e.g. Agentforce and Claude-style assistants) to automate workflows and shorten cycle times. You also establish AI governance and champion self-service analytics.
* Partner with IT to ensure secure APIs and strict adherence to GDPR, ISO27001, and TISAX standards.
* Track business KPIs (utilization, margin visibility) to demonstrate platform ROI and drive continuous improvement in agility and UX.



**What helps you succeed in this role** 



* 5–10+ years experience in Business Tech/Operations, including "Head of" or Lead roles within professional services or consulting.
* Deep and hands-on platform expertise and credibility in Salesforce and Certinia (FinancialForce), with a clear understanding of the Sales-to-Invoicing lifecycle.
* An AI-First Mindset: A proven track record of deploying AI features (Einstein, Agentforce, LLMs) and agentic workflows to drive operational efficiency.
* Experience managing SaaS portfolios post-implementation, including vendor licensing, roadmap ownership, and executive-level prioritization.
* Collaborative Leadership skills and ability to lead expert teams and manage outsourced partners effectively across a multi-region environment.
* Professional fluency in English. Additionally Finnish, Swedish, or German skills are a plus.



**Nice to have** 



* Experience in leading the transition from a major implementation project to a steady-state "run" function.
* Exposure to data and analytics tooling (CRM Analytics, Power BI, Tableau) and AI-assisted self-service analytics.



**Futurice offers you** 




 At Futurice you will join an internationally recognized, employee-friendly consultancy with a strong culture of trust, transparency and continuous learning. You will work directly with the COO and the wider Leadership Team on a portfolio of platforms that is core to how Futurice runs. We offer competitive senior leadership compensation, a flexible hybrid working model, and the opportunity to shape a critical function from the foundations up.
 



 You’ll get a thorough local and global onboarding, plus your very own Futubuddy to support you throughout your journey with us. And to top it off, you’ll have the chance to join our Onboarding Camp.
 



**Compensation** 




 Your complete compensation package will be discussed in detail during the recruitment process. Our salary model is designed to offer a range of levels based on three factors: skills, responsibilities and impact. We are dedicated to fostering an inclusive and supportive work environment where every employee has the opportunity to thrive and advance in their career and become better versions of themselves.
 



 During the initial interview round, we will discuss the salary range for this position. We offer a fixed salary with the possibility of performance-based bonuses and additional benefits.
 



**Next steps** 




 If this sounds like the opportunity you’re looking for, please submit your application by 1.6.2026.
 



 Our application form is about as easy as it gets. All you need to do is enter your contact information and upload your attachments. We’d love to see a CV, and a few lines about yourself and why you want to join Futurice. You can also submit links to your LinkedIn, as well as share other attachments relevant to the application. After we receive your application, we will reach out to you. Candidates moving forward can expect an initial conversation to get to know each other better, followed by a more in-depth discussion focusing on your professional skills. The final stage is a general chat with the team. Please note that reference calls are also an important part of our recruitment process.
 



**What’s it like to work here** 




 Ever since Futurice was founded, we’ve focused on creating a workplace people genuinely enjoy, Mondays included. We’ve built a welcoming culture where trust, kindness, and well-being matter as much as great work. Our atmosphere is open and warm, whether you’re in the office or working remotely. You’ll quickly feel part of the community where coffee chats, virtual fikas, or after-work hangouts happen naturally.
 



 Because our culture is shaped by all of us, every day, you’ll have an opportunity to influence how we work, connect, and evolve as a community. Across countries, teams, and time zones, everyone brings their own character, helping shape how we work, connect, and evolve together.
 



 At Futurice, new joiners aren’t expected to fit into a mold. Come as you are, whatever your background. We believe in the power of different perspectives, and diversity is a key part of our success at delivering customer value when they trust us with some of their most challenging and inspiring challenges. You can read more about our DE&I commitment here.
 



 We help organizations unlock new value by combining data, AI, design, and strategy. Our promise is simple: faster, smarter delivery; AI-powered decisions; and exceptional, data-driven experiences. We deliver clarity, and clarity delivers results.
 



 Our vision is to redefine organizations with data and AI. Large enterprises work with us to build smarter services, accelerate decision-making, and strengthen their competitive edge.
 



 Founded in 2000, Futurice has grown into an 800+ person community across Europe. Our culture is built on trust, transparency, care, and continuous improvement. We offer a collaborative, international environment where ambitious people learn, grow, and make a real impact.

title: Digital Workplace Consultant
description:
Senior konsult för Digital arbetsplats
   

  

 Det här möjligheten för dig som vill ta en tydlig senior roll i kundnära leverans, där du kombinerar teknisk spets med rådgivning och långsiktigt ansvar för kundernas digitala arbetsplats. Här får du arbeta end to end, påverka hur vi utvecklar vår klienttjänst och samtidigt vara mentor och förebild i teamet.
   

  

 Om rollen
   

  

 Du ingår i vårt tvärfunktionella
 **Leveransteam** 
 och arbetar nära kund med att vidareutveckla, förvalta och förbättra deras digitala arbetsplats. Rollen är både
 **operativ** 
 och
 **rådgivande** 
 och kräver att du kan växla mellan teknisk leverans, långsiktig förvaltning och kunddialog. Tyngdpunkten ligger på att skapa
 **stabila** 
 ,
 **hållbara klientmiljöer** 
 över tid och att omsätta kundens behov till tydliga
 **rekommendationer** 
 och
 **prioriterade aktiviteter** 
 .
   

  

 Team och sammanhang
   

  

 Du blir en del av ett erfaret team om fyra konsulter med tydligt fokus på kundernas digitala arbetsplats. Du tar en senior roll i kunddialogen och bidrar med mentorskap, samtidigt som ni tillsammans ansvarar för leveransen. Du har också ett bredare nätverk av kollegor inom klientleverans och närliggande specialistområden.
   

  

**Detta kommer du att göra:**
* Designa, implementera och vidareutveckla kunders digitala arbetsplats och klientplattform med tyngdpunkt på Windows och modern endpoint management.
* Fånga behov i kunddialog och omsätta dem till hållbara lösningar, rekommendationer och prioriterade aktiviteter.
* Driva och vidareutveckla kundernas livscykelhantering för klientmiljöer, inklusive förbättringar, felsökning, optimering och kvalitetssäkring.
* Hålla i klientforum och ge teknisk rådgivning kring nuläge, roadmap och förbättringsförslag.
* Bidra i implementationer och migreringar kopplade till modern klienthantering, särskilt inom Configuration Manager/SCCM och Intune.
* Bidra till teamets arbetssätt och kvalitet genom att agera mentor och bollplank för kollegor.


 Rollen är en del av vårt affärsområde Managed Services Provider (MSP), där vi hjälper kunder att etablera, utveckla och förvalta sina lösningar långsiktigt.
   

  

 Varför Advania
   

  

 Vi växer, får in nya kunder och hjälper befintliga kunder att utvecklas. Det ger dig möjlighet att påverka både kundernas resa och våra tjänster, samtidigt som du får tillgång till utbildningar, certifieringar och ett starkt nätverk av experter.
   

  

**Din bakgrund och kompetens✨**
 Vi söker dig som är trygg i din tekniska kompetens och trivs i en roll där du kombinerar teknik, kundkontakt och långsiktig utveckling. Du har ett helhetsperspektiv, tar ansvar och är van att driva tekniska dialoger och leveranser nära kund.
   

  

 Vi ser gärna att du har:
   

  

  

* Erfarenhet av implementation, vidareutveckling och förvaltning inom digital arbetsplats och klientplattformar.
* Erfarenhet av migrering från Configuration Manager/SCCM till Intune.
* God kunskap inom Microsoft Intune, Configuration Manager och Autopilot.
* Erfarenhet av Active Directory och Entra ID.
* God förståelse för Endpoint Security och Defender for Endpoint.
* Erfarenhet av PowerShell.
* Stark kompetens inom Windows-baserad klienthantering.
* Erfarenhet av image-hantering samt paketering av applikationer, drivrutiner och mjukvara.
* Erfarenhet av M365, OneDrive, MDM, GPO, Conditional Access, MFA och klientcertifikat.
* Förmåga att dokumentera och ta fram tydliga design- och beslutsunderlag.
* Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift.


 Meriterande är erfarenhet av design och arkitektur inom modern workplace, arbete med presale eller förstudier, kunskap om iOS och Android samt bakgrund från MSP eller annan kundnära tjänsteleverans.
   

  

 Självledarskap och konsultmässighet
   

  

 I den här rollen behöver du vara självgående i praktiken. Det innebär att du tar ansvar för att driva arbetet framåt, gör kloka prioriteringar, kommunicerar tydligt och söker stöd när det behövs. Du är trygg i dialogen med kund, skapar förtroende och omsätter behov till rekommendationer, beslut och aktiviteter som ger effekt över tid.
   

  

**Vi ser fram emot din ansökan! 👋**
 Visa gärna ditt intresse så snart som möjligt då vi intervjuar löpande. Vi välkomnar sökanden med olika bakgrunder, erfarenheter och synsätt, eftersom vi vet att en bredare mångfald berikar var och en av oss och stärker såväl effektivitet som kreativitet i vårt arbete.
   

  

 Som en del av vår rekryteringsprocess genomgår våra slutkandidater en obligatorisk bakgrundskontroll, en för oss kvalitativ kontroll inför ett anställningsbeslut. För att komplettera övriga delar i processen kan logik‑ och personlighetstest förekomma. De används som ett stöd för dialog och helhetsbedömning. Advania samarbetar med Ljung & Sjöberg i ärenden kopplat till alkohol-, drog- och spelproblematik och är en certifierad "Proaktiv Arbetsplats".
   

  

 Tveka inte att höra av dig om du har några frågor eller funderingar.☀️
   

  

 Det är du som arbetar nära kunden som vet vad dem behöver och vad som blir den bästa lösningen för just deras unika behov, både i dag och i morgon. Därför tycker vi att det är du som ska fatta besluten. Det är genom att erbjuda säkra, hållbara och kundanpassade lösningar som vi skapar värde för kunderna och samhället i stort.
   

  

 Vi bryr oss om hur våra medarbetare mår – på riktigt. Därför samarbetar Advania med Ljung & Sjöberg för att skapa en trygg, proaktiv arbetsmiljö med stöd kring alkohol-, drog- och beroenderelaterade frågor. Tillsammans bygger vi en hållbar arbetsplats där det är okej att be om hjälp, och där förebyggande arbete gör skillnad – för individen, teamet och företaget.
   

  

 I en miljö präglad av stort kundfokus och frihet under ansvar blir det extra viktigt för oss att bygga starka team bestående av ödmjuka stjärnor. Att arbeta i en inkluderande miljö, med kollegor och kunder som vill utvecklas, ger oss möjligheten att trivas och ha riktigt roligt på jobbet. Vi tror på en platt organisation med agilt arbetssätt och flexibilitet. Detta är det enda sättet för en hållbar framtid.
   

  

 Advania Sverige, ”The tech company with people at heart”, har kontor över hela landet, från Luleå i norr till Malmö i syd. Dagligen hjälper våra 1 700 specialister våra kunder, både inom privat och offentlig sektor, i deras ambitioner och mål att digitalisera sina verksamheter. Genom långsiktiga relationer, ledande teknologier, moderna plattformslösningar och strategiska partnerskap formar vi framtidens IT-landskap. Vårt syfte sträcker sig bortom teknik: att ge människor kraften att skapa hållbara värden.
   

  

 Advaniagruppen levererar tjänster till kunder i Sverige, Norge, Storbritannien, Island, Finland och Danmark inom hållbar och säker digitalisering.

title: Engineering Manager - Confidence
description:
Think it, build it, ship it, tweak it" is at the core of Spotify's product development approach. In the Experimentation product area we are providing Spotify and external customers with Confidence, our platform to quickly and safely iterate through ideas, learn from them and make informed decisions for better products.
   

  

 At Spotify, experimentation touches almost all of our functions from marketing via content management to consumer products, and we’re running several thousands of tests every year. Through confidence, we 're sharing all our findings and practices with more companies as a commercial SaaS product.
   

  

 The team you will manage is a skilled and highly engaged group of engineers that are distributed over Europe. As an Engineering manager, you coach them individually and as a team, maintaining their strong team culture and helping them thrive and and grow. Your technical experience provides mentorship and guidelines to the team, which ensures quality and timeliness of your deliveries. Your leadership promotes creativity, collaboration and courage, which forms a kind and productive team with a high bar for quality and pace of delivery.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

* You will hire, coach and develop the careers of a team of engineers
* You will be responsible for high-quality deliveries
* You will partner with product managers to support with prioritizations and product visions
* You will support the engineering team and work with Staff engineers to formulate the technical strategy needed to deliver on our vision
* You will do hands on engineering work from time to time
* In the end, your primary goal is to support a highly effective engineering team delivering an amazing product


 Who You Are
   

  

* You thrive when developing great people, not just great products and cultivating a strong engineering culture in an agile environment
* You are skilled in collaborating on and developing distributed systems that can scale to millions of users.
* You have experience with data warehouses and data processing at scale
* You have worked on commercial SaaS products in the past and have hands on experience taking features from zero to one
* You are a brave learner and see unfamiliar territories as an opportunity to grow.
* You are a senior individual contributor (or has been) with strong people skills and leadership experience
* You’re passionate about software engineering best practices and love to have an impact on large-scale tech problems
* You care deeply about quality of the products your working and, and hold people to a high standard
* Naturally, you harness AI as a tool that helps you be more effective at your work


 Where You'll Be
   

  

* Based in Stockholm, Sweden
* We offer you the flexibility to work where you work best! There will be some in person meetings, but still allows for flexibility to work from home. We ask that you come in 3 times per week.


 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us. Find our AI notice here: https://lifeatspotify.com/ai-notice
   

  

 Today, we are the world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service.

title: SAP Basis konsult (senior)
description:
Vi söker en
 **senior SAP Basis konsult** 
 som tar ett ledande tekniskt ansvar i en kundnära leverans. Rollen har ett tydligt uppdrag: att ta över en befintlig kundleverans och etablera SAP Basis drift som en tjänst i Advanias regi.
   

  

 Under de första 12–18 månaderna är framgång i rollen att uppnå stabil och säker drift, säkerställa robust teknisk förvaltning samt att sätta struktur, arbetssätt och grundförmåga som gör leveransen hållbar och möjlig att skala över tid. Det här är en roll för dig som vill kombinera operativt ansvar med förbättringsarbete och som trivs i en tekniskt tung leverans där du förväntas ta ägarskap.
   

  

 Rollen är en renodlad teknisk roll inom drift och infrastruktur. Det är inte en funktionell SAP konsultroll.
   

  

 Det värde du skapar i rollen ✨
   

  

 I den här rollen skapar du värde genom att göra SAP miljön stabil, säker och förutsägbar för kunden. Du bidrar med teknisk kontroll, minskar risk, stärker driftsäkerheten och lägger grunden för en leverans som fungerar lika bra idag som imorgon.
   

  

**Det märks i praktiken genom att du:**
* tar tekniskt ägarskap för SAP Basis i kundens miljö
* säkerställer stabil drift och teknisk förvaltning i komplexa enterprise miljöer
* driver förbättringar som stärker kvalitet, prestanda och robusthet
* etablerar rutiner, standarder och dokumentation som gör leveransen mindre sårbar och mer skalbar
* omsätter tekniska behov och risker till tydliga rekommendationer och välgrundade beslut
* bygger förtroende genom att vara tydlig, ansvarstagande och relevant i dialogen med kunden


 Du arbetar nära kundens tekniska team och i samverkan med Advanias specialister inom infrastruktur och säkerhet för att säkerställa en helhet som fungerar över tid.
   

  

 Ditt ansvar i praktiken
   

  

 Du arbetar självständigt med både daglig drift och långsiktig förvaltning av SAP miljön. Du ansvarar för att hålla ihop den tekniska leveransen, prioritera rätt och driva arbetet framåt inom givna ramar.
   

  

**I rollen ingår att:**
* installera, konfigurera och uppgradera SAP system.
* arbeta med löpande systemadministration, övervakning och prestandaoptimering.
* hantera patchning och kernel uppgraderingar.
* arbeta med backup och restore.
* hantera systemlandskap i dev, test, QA och produktion, inklusive systemkopiering och refresh.
* driva incidenthantering och felsökning samt ha kontakt med SAP support vid behov.
* dokumentera, standardisera och automatisera driftsrutiner.
