title: DIGITAL ANALYST
description:
City: Solna
Job Function: Marketing & Sales
**Digital Analyst – E-commerce performance**
--------------------------------------------

  


Scandinavian Airlines (SAS) is looking for a Digital Analyst to strengthen our Digital Sales organization and support the continuous optimization of our e-commerce performance. As part of SAS’s broader digital transformation, this role will play a key part in enabling a more data-driven, insight-led commercial organization.

  



You will work at the intersection of business, data, and technology, helping e-commerce teams understand performance, identify opportunities, and make better decisions across the digital customer journey. This includes delivering actionable insights, improving tracking and reporting foundations, attribution models, and supporting experimentation and optimization initiatives across web, app, and marketing channels.

  



This role is suited for someone who enjoys hands-on analysis, working close to the business, and collaborating across functions in a fast-paced digital environment, with the opportunity to shape how data is used to drive commercial impact, at scale.

**Challenges you will work on**
-------------------------------

  




* Turning large volumes of digital and e‑commerce data into clear, actionable insights that support day‑to‑day decision making
* Understanding and optimizing complex customer journeys across multiple touchpoints and channels
* Ensuring high-quality tracking and data reliability across digital platforms, in collaboration with product, digital, and IT teams
* Balancing ad‑hoc insight requests with recurring reporting needs in a fast-paced environment
* Supporting teams in becoming more data self-sufficient through improved dashboards and reporting solutions
* Helping stakeholders interpret performance correctly and avoid misreading metrics or attribution results
* Working in a test‑and‑learn culture where experimentation, iteration, and learning from failures are encouraged
* Exploring how AI and automation can streamline recurring reporting and free up time for higher-value analysis

  


**Key Responsibilities:**

  


* Analyze e‑commerce performance with a focus on conversion rate (CR) and cost per acquisition (CPA)
* Deliver regular reports and ad‑hoc analyses to e‑commerce managers and other stakeholders
* Conduct funnel, journey, and behavioral analyses to identify optimization opportunities
* Support campaign and attribution analysis together with paid media and performance teams
* Enable and improve self-service reporting using Google Analytics and related tools
* Verify, implement, and troubleshoot tracking using Google Tag Manager
* Support setup, analysis, and follow‑up of A/B tests and experiments
* Collaborate closely with e‑commerce, product, digital, and IT teams to align measurement and insights with business needs
* Contribute to maintaining and evolving existing KPIs, and support the definition of new ones when needed
* Identify and implement opportunities to automate recurring reports and data workflows, reducing manual effort across the team Explore and test AI-assisted tools and methods to enhance analysis, reporting efficiency, and insight generation
**The Team**
------------

  


You’ll join a growing Digital Sales team within eCommerce, responsible for driving digital revenue through performance marketing, optimization of our web and app channels, SEO/SEM, and data-driven analytics. We work closely with Digital/IT, Brand & Marketing, Partnerships, Inflight, and Analytics, and the wider Commercial organization to deliver aligned, high-impact initiatives. Together, we’re building a modern and scalable digital ecosystem that supports SAS’s global commercial goals.

**To be successful, we believe you have**
-----------------------------------------

  

* Experience working hands-on with Google Analytics and a good understanding of core e‑commerce metrics
* The ability to analyze data and translate it into clear insights that support business decisions
* Basic experience with SQL and a willingness to continue developing your technical skills
* Hands-on experience with A/B testing and an understanding of experimentation principles
* Confidence working with tracking and tagging, especially using Google Tag Manager
* A pragmatic, problem‑solving mindset and enjoyment in digging into details when needed
* Strong collaboration skills and the ability to work with multiple stakeholders across different teams
* Openness to feedback, learning, and experimenting in a fast-paced, “fail fast” environment
* Good communication skills, enabling you to explain data and insights to both technical and non-technical audiences
* Exposure to BI or visualization tools such as Looker, Power BI, or similar

  


**It’s a plus if you also have:**

  


* Experience working with BigQuery or other cloud-based data warehouses
* Familiarity with experimentation or CRO tools (e.g. Optimizely, VWO, or similar)
* Basic knowledge of Python or R for data analysis or automation
* Experience working with attribution models or media performance analysis
* Previous experience in e‑commerce, travel, or large-scale digital environments
* Interest in continuously improving how data, tracking, and insights are used across teams
* Experience using AI tools to supported data analysis, documentation, or reporting workflows
* Interests in automation of data pipelines or report generation using Python, SQL scheduling, or BI tool features
**Why SAS?**
------------

  


At SAS, we offer extensive opportunities for professional development in an international, fast-paced working environment. We are dedicated to the continuous growth of our employees. Working with us comes with a variety of benefits, including:

  




* Travel Perks: Enjoy discounted travel opportunities around the world with SAS.
* Health & Wellness: Access to health and wellness benefits, including a newly renovated gym with complimentary classes such as CrossFit and yoga.
* Discounts: Receive discounts from a wide range of brands, as well as on transportation to and from airports, airport shops, hotels, and car rentals.
* Work Environment: Our office location in Frösundavik offers a vibrant workspace with a restaurant, café, and easy access to outdoor activities in Hagaparken and Brunnsviken. Engage in running, tennis, outdoor gym sessions, kayaking, and stand-up paddling with equipment available free of charge.
* Convenient Commute: Benefit from a non-stop bus service connecting our office to Solna station, and commuter trains, alongside a network of cycle paths.
**Our Culture at SAS**
----------------------

  


At SAS, we are dedicated to caring for each other, delighting our travelers, and driving the transformation towards sustainable aviation. As a future colleague on our team, you’ll join a culture where we work collaboratively towards common goals, recognize each other's contributions, and celebrate successes. Our focus is on safe, sustainable, and punctual execution, and we are committed to protecting our planet while transforming SAS for the future. This is an empowering workplace where you can thrive, grow, and take ownership of your work. Join us at SAS and be part of shaping the future of aviation!

**Additional information**
--------------------------

  


* **Deadline for application**: 29/05/2026. Please send us your CV as soon as possible, as interviews are conducted continuously, and the position may be filled before the application deadline. Note that we are not able to handle any applications that are sent by email, due to GDPR regulations.
* **Desired start date:** As soon as possible.
* **Position**: Fulltime (100%) starting with a 6-month probation period.
* **This position is based in Frösundavik, Solna (Stockholm)**, and you will be expected to work onsite. Remote work may also be an option, depending on the agreement made with your manager.

  



Come and fly with us!



#LI-VK1

  


SAS, Scandinavia's leading airline since 1946, operates from its principal hub at Copenhagen Airport (CPH), complemented by hubs in Oslo (OSL) and Stockholm (ARN). Our mission is to connect Scandinavia with the world and the world with Scandinavia. Each year, SAS serves more than 25 million passengers and transports 55 tons of cargo to 135 destinations across Europe, the USA, and Asia. With a passionate workforce of over 10,000 colleagues, we collaborate with partners and customers to drive transformative changes in aviation. We are committed to achieving net-zero emissions by 2050, embodying the visionary spirit of our founders: “To move from the old to what is about to come, is the only tradition worth keeping”. Innovation and societal progress are at the heart of everything we do. For

title: Business Development Rep (AI Cloud)
description:
**About Featherless**
---------------------


Featherless.ai is building the world’s most reliable open-model inference platform — a serverless foundation for deploying and scaling AI without infrastructure overhead.


Backed by **AMD, Airbus Ventures, 500 Global, Kickstart Ventures, HF0 Residency, Panache Ventures, and Oakseed Ventures**, we’re a well-funded team of researchers and engineers on a mission to **democratize AI** through performance and accessibility.


Our cloud provides instant access to **30,000+ open-source AI models** and the research innovations powering next-generation efficiency, reliability, and model optimization.

**About the Role**
------------------


We’re looking for an experienced **Business Development Representative (AI Cloud)** — someone technical that thrives at the intersection of AI, communication, and execution.


This is *not* a traditional sales role. You’re expected to be fluent in AI and be able to hold your own in conversations with model creators, AI startups, enterprises, and developers exploring open-model deployment.


If you're a charismatic developer looking to expand into sales we want to speak to you.

**What You’ll Own Immediately**
-------------------------------

* Build & qualify pipeline across enterprises and AI startups
* Manage inbound requests through chat and email
* Manage outreach sequences and automations (HubSpot, Clay, Reply.io, n8n)
* Re-engage existing sign-ups and subscribers; identify high-value users
* Coordinate partner calls & discovery meetings with the CRO and founders
* Track CRM, pipeline metrics, and weekly reporting
* Attend events to generate pipeline and establish key relationships
* Propose creative GTM experiments and new partnership opportunities

**What You Bring**
------------------

* 1–3 years in **Cloud Infrastructure Sales or Developer Relations**
* Comfortable engaging technical audiences (developers, founders, researchers)
* AI power user
* Excellent written and verbal communication in english — concise, credible, human
* Entrepreneurial and self-driven — you operate independently and get things done
* Familiar with HubSpot, Clay, n8n, or similar tools
* Bonus: Fluent in French or German

**Why Featherless**
-------------------

* Work directly with exec on high-impact partnerships and GTM strategy
* Build your network across one of the fastest-growing open AI ecosystems
* Be part of a small, high-performing team making open weight AI accessible to everyone

title: Enterprise Account Executive
description:
**Job Requisition ID #**


26WD98364**Enterprise Account Executive**

**Job Requisition Summary**


Autodesk is seeking an **Enterprise Account Executive** to strategically grow and expand relationships across high-value enterprise accounts. This role is responsible for leading comprehensive account growth strategies, driving incremental revenue, expanding product adoption, and positioning Autodesk as a long-term strategic partner to customers undergoing digital transformation.


The Enterprise Account Executive will own strategic executive relationships, account planning, revenue generation, pipeline management, complex deal negotiations, and orchestration of cross-functional account teams. This role goes beyond execution: it requires the ability to refine and innovate account strategies, influence executive stakeholders, lead high-complexity commercial motions, and drive measurable business outcomes for both Autodesk and the customer.


This role is suited for an experienced enterprise sales leader who can operate with senior decision-makers, navigate complex customer organizations, lead matrixed teams, and create scalable growth opportunities across EBA and non-EBA enterprise accounts.

**Key Responsibilities**

**Strategic Account Growth**

* Lead and refine comprehensive growth strategies for assigned enterprise accounts, including EBA and non-EBA customers
* Develop multi-year strategic account plans aligned to customer priorities, Autodesk growth objectives, and long-term value creation
* Identify and pursue expansion opportunities across new business units, buyer groups, personas, and use cases
* Drive buyer seat expansion and product adoption across complex customer organizations
* Lead QBRs, executive check-ins, and senior stakeholder engagement to review progress, business outcomes, risks, and future growth opportunities
* Innovate account strategies that create scalable growth models and influence broader business outcomes

**Revenue Generation & Pipeline Management**

* Maximize incremental revenue through upsell, cross-sell, upgraded products, new offerings, and EBA token consumption strategies
* Own pipeline development, pipeline health, and forecasting accuracy for growth, expansion, and renewal opportunities
* Use data-driven insights to assess account potential, customer spend trends, adoption signals, whitespace, and risk
* Proactively adjust account tactics based on customer priorities, market changes, competitive dynamics, and business goals
* Deliver predictable revenue performance while identifying transformational opportunities that support long-term customer and Autodesk growth

**Executive Relationship Management**

* Build and maintain strategic relationships with C-level executives, senior decision-makers, and key influencers across assigned accounts
* Adapt communication style to diverse executive audiences and manage challenging conversations with confidence, empathy, and business relevance
* Act as a trusted advisor by connecting Autodesk capabilities to the customer’s strategic objectives and transformation priorities
* Develop compelling executive narratives that articulate business value, ROI, competitive differentiation, and long-term partnership opportunities
* Secure and maintain executive sponsorship for strategic initiatives, commercial agreements, and expansion opportunities

**Complex Deal Strategy & Commercial Execution**

* Lead complex enterprise negotiations, including expansions, renewals, multi-year agreements, and high-value commercial structures
* Build value-based business cases that quantify customer impact and support executive decision-making
* Navigate procurement, commercial, legal, and stakeholder complexity to progress opportunities and mitigate risk
* Mentor teams in complex deal negotiations and help shape strategic deal approaches across large enterprise opportunities

**Account Team Unit / Cross-Functional Orchestration**

* Strategically lead partnerships with the extended sales team, Technical Sales, Customer Success, Consulting, Marketing, Partner teams, and executive stakeholders
* Orchestrate the Account Team Unit to co-develop scalable, impactful customer solutions
* Align technical discovery, messaging, value proposition, and commercial strategy to customer needs
* Drive accountability across internal teams through clear ownership, communication, and execution cadence
* Ensure seamless post-sale handoff to Customer Success for onboarding, implementation, adoption, and ongoing relationship management
* Serve as an escalation point for customer challenges and internal alignment issues
* Partner with Customer Success and Consulting teams to ensure customers achieve measurable business outcomes from Autodesk solutions

**Industry, Competitive & Business Leadership**

* Maintain deep knowledge of the customer’s industry, business model, transformation priorities, competitive landscape, and regulatory environment
* Translate industry challenges into tailored Autodesk solutions and differentiated value propositions
* Provide customer and market insights to internal Sales, Product, Strategy, and Marketing teams
* Influence Autodesk’s go-to-market approach by sharing enterprise customer needs, competitive intelligence, and emerging market opportunities
* Represent Autodesk as a strategic thought partner in executive-level customer conversations

**Minimum Qualifications**

* Bachelor’s degree or equivalent practical experience
* 10+ years of enterprise sales, strategic account management, or consultative business development experience
* Proven success managing complex enterprise accounts and driving significant revenue growth
* Experience engaging C-level executives and senior stakeholders across large, matrixed customer organizations
* Demonstrated ability to lead complex commercial negotiations, renewals, expansions, and multi-year enterprise agreements
* Strong track record of pipeline generation, forecast accuracy, and revenue attainment
* Experience leading cross-functional account teams, including Technical Sales, Customer Success, Consulting, Marketing, Partner, Legal, Finance, and Deal Desk stakeholders
* Strong business acumen, analytical thinking, executive communication, and consultative selling skills

**Preferred Qualifications**

* Experience in enterprise SaaS, cloud, platform, digital transformation, or technology solution sales
* Familiarity with Autodesk’s Architecture, Engineering, and Construction customer segments and the business challenges, workflows, and digital transformation priorities within the AECO industry
* Experience leading strategic customer transformations, large-scale adoption programs, or executive-sponsored growth initiatives
* Advanced skills in value-based selling, ROI modeling, business case development, and executive storytelling
* Experience using Salesforce or similar CRM and account planning tools
* Experience mentoring account teams or influencing sales strategy beyond assigned accounts

**About Autodesk**


Autodesk empowers innovators to design and make a better world for all. Our technology spans architecture, engineering, construction, manufacturing, media, and entertainment, helping customers solve complex challenges through design, make, and digital transformation solutions.


#LI-SK1

**Learn More**

**About Autodesk**


Welcome to Autodesk! Amazing things are created every day with our software – from the greenest buildings and cleanest cars to the smartest factories and biggest hit movies. We help innovators turn their ideas into reality, transforming not only how things are made, but what can be made.


We take great pride in our culture here at Autodesk – it’s at the core of everything we do. Our culture guides the way we work and treat each other, informs how we connect with customers and partners, and defines how we show up in the world.


When you’re an Autodesker, you can do meaningful work that helps build a better world designed and made for all. Ready to shape the world and your future? Join us!

**Salary transparency**


Salary is one part of Autodesk’s competitive compensation package. Offers are based on the candidate’s experience and geographic location. In addition to base salaries, our compensation package may include annual cash bonuses, commissions for sales roles, stock grants, and a comprehensive benefits package.**Diversity & Belonging**  

We take pride in cultivating a culture of belonging where everyone can thrive. Learn more here: https://www.autodesk.com/company/diversity-and-belonging

**Are you an existing contractor or consultant with Autodesk?**

Please search for open jobs and apply internally (not on this external site).
company_description: At Autodesk, we believe that when you have the right tools to work and think flexibly you have the power to transform what actually needs making. The power to design and make a better world for all.

title: Pre-Sales Architect - Sweden
description:
**OUR STORY:**

Join Scaleway and shape the sovereign cloud of tomorrow !
Since 1999, we have been designing secure, sustainable infrastructures aimed at supporting the most ambitious companies.

Historically known for our dedicated servers (Dedibox), we made a strategic shift to cloud computing in 2015. Staying true to our principles of simplicity, flexibility, and technical excellence, we have become one of the leading players in Europe in the sector.

With the rise of artificial intelligence, we have strengthened our commitment, supported by the Iliad Group, which is investing €3 billion to develop a serious, sovereign AI alternative to American and Asian giants.

Every day, thanks to our fast-growing portfolio of cloud and AI products (bare metal, containerization, serverless, AI, etc.), Scaleway proudly serves thousands of customer across the private and public sector, from corporations like France Télévisions or Hachette Livre, to fast-growing startups like Photoroom and Biolevate, to institutions like the City of Copenhagen.

Our offices are located in **Paris, Lille, Toulouse, Rennes, Rouen, Bordeaux and Lyon.** **WHY WE NEED YOU?**

Our growth is driving us to strengthen our Solutions Architect team to **support our commercial expansion** across international markets.

Your mission will be to **guide clients** through their cloud journey with Scaleway, from discovery to migration, in order to **accelerate customer acquisition** and deliver **tailor-made technical solutions**.

**YOUR FUTURE TEAM**

We work in a collaborative and international environment where the diversity of Scalers, combined with a spirit of sharing, helps bring new projects to life every day, advancing our ambitions together.

You will be part of a team of experienced Pre-Sales Architects, paired with Account Executives, Inside Sales Representatives, Customer Success Managers, and Business Developers, all working together to serve strategic markets.

You’ll operate closely with the Sweden-based sales team while remaining integrated within the global Solutions Architecture department.

**YOUR DAILY ROUTINE**

* Act as the **primary technical contact** during the pre-sales phase for enterprise prospects and clients


* Understand **customer business needs and technical constraints** to design Scaleway-based architectures


* Support clients throughout the **discovery and migration journey** until the project transitions to support


* Conduct **in-depth technical discovery** and propose custom solutions leveraging Scaleway products


* **Collaborate with Sales, Product, and Engineering** teams to address customer challenges


* Drive **technical workshops** and proof-of-concept sessions with clients


* Maintain and **share knowledge** on Scaleway’s evolving cloud offering


* Participate in **improving internal pre-sales tools** and processes


* **Represent Scaleway** at industry events and webinars when needed


* Contribute to the **continuous improvement** of the Pre-Sales practice and documentation



**ABOUT YOU**

**HARDSKILLS**
* 3 to 10 years of experience in technical pre-sales or solution architecture roles


* Experience working with public cloud solutions and migrations


* Familiarity with container orchestration, Infrastructure as Code, or Linux systems


* Solid understanding of application/server architectures and datacenter environments


* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or equivalent practical experience


* Strong communication skills in both **Swedish** **and English**



**SOFTSKILLS**
* Customer-oriented with a consultative mindset


* Ability to understand and translate complex technical requirements into scalable solutions


* Excellent collaboration and stakeholder management abilities


* Comfortable presenting to both technical and C-level audiences


* Proactive, adaptable, and eager to drive innovation



**WHAT YOU WILL FIND AT SCALEWAY ++++**

**Hybrid work:** We offer up to 3 days of remote work per week.
**Well-being commitments:** Whether it’s access to a gym, daycare places, or discounted services for caring services, Scaleway is committed to supporting Scalers in maintaining a balanced life.
**International environment:** With dozens of nationalities, Scaleway offers a stimulating environment where English is as widely spoken as French.
**Career & Mobility:** Our managers value internal mobility, and opportunities to transition to other entities within the Iliad Group are accessible to all Scalers.

**Why join the Scaleway adventure?**

✔ A rich and diverse product offering: Scaleway offers over 100 public cloud products in IaaS, PaaS, and AI.

✔ A cutting-edge technical environment: Scaleway provides modern infrastructures, including high-performance bare metal servers, to tackle exciting technical challenges.

✔ Commitment to responsible cloud: Scaleway is dedicated to a more responsible cloud, with data centers powered solely by renewable energy since 2017, minimizing our ecological footprint and holding top-level certification.

**THE NEXT STEPS …**

1 - Talent acquisition interview (30 min)
2 - Head of Sales Architecture / International PSA (30 min)
3 - Technical Interview to understand your technical skills and approach to the role (45 min)
4 - CSO Interview

Version française disponible ici
*At Scaleway, we are committed to building an inclusive and respectful workplace where everyone has a fair opportunity to thrive.*
*All applications are considered with care, regardless of age, gender, sexual orientation, ethnic or social background, religion, disability, or any other characteristic.*
*We believe great ideas come from everywhere, and everyone which is why you should definitely apply.*

title: Solution Sales Executive - Stockholm
description:
**Company Description** **Devoteam is a leading Google Cloud Partner, empowering businesses to harness the full potential of Google Cloud technologies.**  

  

With 20+ years of successful Google Cloud implementations and a team of certified experts, we drive digital transformation across various industries. We foster a culture of innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning, providing you with the tools and support you need to excel in your career.


At Devoteam, we champion a revolutionary "New Way of Work" that prioritizes flexibility, personal growth, and joint success.  



  

  

**Job Description** **Accelerate Your Career: Solution Sales Executive - Google Cloud**


Are you a seasoned sales professional with a passion for cloud technology and a proven track record of success in the IT consulting space? Devoteam is seeking a highly motivated Solution Sales Executive to join our expanding Google Cloud practice. In this role, you will drive new business acquisition and revenue growth by selling our comprehensive suite of Google Cloud consulting services and solutions, with a focus on professional services.

**What You'll Do:**

* **Develop and execute a strategic sales plan:** Target key accounts, identify opportunities, and build a strong pipeline to achieve ambitious quotas and revenue targets.
* **Become a Trusted Advisor:** Conduct in-depth needs assessments, understand client challenges, and position Devoteam as their go-to partner for Google Cloud solutions.
* **Deliver Winning Presentations:** Craft and deliver compelling sales presentations that showcase the value proposition of our Google Cloud offerings, emphasizing our expertise in professional services.
* **Collaborate with Experts:** Work closely with our technical consultants to design and propose tailored solutions that address client requirements, ensuring seamless project delivery.
* **Negotiate and Close Deals:** Secure favorable terms and conditions, maximizing revenue and profitability while building long-term client relationships.
* **Stay Ahead of the Curve:** Maintain a deep understanding of the evolving Google Cloud ecosystem, including new products, services, and market trends, to provide cutting-edge solutions.

  

  

**Qualifications** **Proven Success:** A demonstrable track record of exceeding sales targets in the IT consulting services industry, with experience selling technology solutions.

* **Cloud Expertise:** Strong understanding of cloud computing concepts, with specific knowledge of the Google Cloud Platform (GCP).
* **Enterprise Focus:** Experience selling to enterprise clients is highly desirable, with a proven ability to navigate complex sales cycles and build relationships with key decision-makers.
* **Communication & Presentation Excellence:** Exceptional communication, presentation, and interpersonal skills, with the ability to articulate complex technical concepts clearly and concisely.
* **Negotiation & Closing Prowess:** Strong negotiation and closing skills, with a proven ability to secure favorable deals.
* **Team Player:** Ability to work independently and as part of a collaborative team in a fast-paced environment.
* **Education:** Bachelor's degree in business, technology, or a related field.

  

  

**Additional Information**  

Devoteam is committed to creating a diverse and inclusive workplace where everyone feels valued and respected. We encourage applications from individuals with diverse backgrounds and experiences.

* **Competitive Compensation:** Enjoy a competitive compensation package with an uncapped commission structure, rewarding your hard work and success.
* **Comprehensive Benefits:** Benefit from comprehensive health insurance, a retirement plan, and generous paid time off.
* **Growth Opportunities:** Take advantage of excellent opportunities for professional development and career advancement within our growing Google Cloud practice.
* **Cutting-Edge Technology:** Work with the latest Google Cloud technologies and contribute to impactful projects that transform businesses.
* **Dynamic Culture:** Be part of a dynamic, supportive, and collaborative team culture that values innovation and personal growth.
* **Flexible Work Arrangements:** Enjoy flexible work arrangements that allow you to balance your professional and personal life.

**To Apply:**

**Please submit your resume and cover letter. We are excited to hear from you!**

title: Lönekonsult
description:
**JOB TITLE: Lönekonsult**


**Placering: Kungsgatan 64, 111 22 Stockholm, Sweden**


**Hybrid**


**Om ADP Sverige AB:**


**Välkommen till ADP Sverige AB, vi har öppnat vårt första kontor i Norden i september 2023 och befinner oss i en tillväxtperiod där vi satsar på att utöka vårt team i våra kontorslokaler på Kungsgatan. Vi erbjuder ett ständigt utvecklande arbete med spännande kunder i en global miljö. ADP finns i ett stort antal länder i hela världen och en av de största aktörerna inom löneoutsourcing med digitala HR-lösningar och arbetar ständigt med AI lösningar för att säkra och utveckla våra leveranser.**

  

  

**Rollbeskrivning:**


**I din roll kommer du att;**


Vara en rådgivande part till våra kunder, säkerställa att aktuella lagar och regelverk efterföljs.


Eget kundansvar


Vi är ett team som samarbetar och kompletterar varandras styrkor och kompetenser inom alla olika områden såsom pensioner, svenska lagar och kollektivavtal.


**Kvalifikationer och personliga egenskaper:**


* Erfarenhet av självständigt lönearbete, minst 2 år. Gärna inom outsourcingbranschen och hanterat hela processen, från ax till limpa.
* Utbildning, eftergymnasial utbildning inom lön lönespecialist/lönekonsult
* God systemvana, lönesystem, tid och-resa, samt övriga ärendehanteringssystem, vi använder oss av Hogia Lön +
* Goda kunskaper av Excel
* Goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, tal och skrift
* Serviceminded, självgående och lösningsorienterad
* Teamplayer
* Integritet
* GDPR

**Rollbeskrivning -Huvudsakliga ansvarsområden:**


* Säkerställa korrekt och punktlig lönehantering i enlighet med avtalade deadlines och kundens behov.
* Fungera som primär kontaktperson för kunder och leverera högkvalitativ service samt sakkunnig rådgivning inom löneområdet.
* Tolka och tillämpa kollektivavtal samt företagsspecifika policys och riktlinjer.
* Uppdatera och underhålla dokumentation, processbeskrivningar och interna rutiner för att säkerställa kontinuerlig effektivitet och efterlevnad.
* Arbeta proaktivt med planering och prioritera arbetsuppgifter för att optimera arbetsflöden och leveranser. Hantera lönejusteringar, korrigeringar samt uppdateringar av löner i enlighet med gällande lagar och bestämmelser.
* Bidra till teamets gemensamma mål genom ett lösningsorienterat och samarbetsinriktat arbetssätt
* Tillhandahålla professionellt stöd och rådgivning till kunder i specifika lönefrågor.

**Vad vi erbjuder:**


**ADP är en inkluderande organisation,**


* **Hybrid, 3-2**
* **Generös friskvårdsbidrag**
* **Flextid**
* **39 timmars veckoarbetstid**
* **Tjänstepension**
* **Var dig själv i en kultu**r som värdesätter rättvisa, inkludering och tillhörighet och ger utrymme för olika perspektiv och insikter.
* **Tillhörighet** gå med i en av tio Business Resource Groups där du kan ansluta globalt med nätverk och allierade som delar gemensamma intressen och erfarenheter.
* **Goda karriärmöjligheter** i en dynamisk miljö med många möjligheter att utvecklas.
* **Var din hälsosammaste** genom bra förmåner från dag 1.
* **Fokus på mental hälsa** och välmående vi är här för att ge exceptionell service till våra kunder, och inget av det händer utan att var och en av oss tar hand om oss själva och finns där för varandra.
* **Arbeta på ett förtag som är dedikerad** att ge tillbaka och skapa en varaktig, positiv inverkan på de samhällen där vi arbetar och lever.
* **Ge tillbaka betald ledighet** volontärarbete för ändamål

**A little about ADP:** We are a comprehensive global provider of cloud-based human capital management (HCM) solutions that unite HR, payroll, talent, time, tax and benefits administration and a leader in business outsourcing services, analytics, and compliance expertise. We believe our people make all the difference in cultivating a down-to-earth culture that embraces our core values, welcomes ideas, encourages innovation, and values belonging. We've received recognition for our work by many esteemed organizations, learn more at ADP Awards and Recognition.


**Diversity, Equity, Inclusion & Equal Employment Opportunity at ADP:** ADP is committed to an inclusive, diverse and equitable workplace, and is further committed to providing equal employment opportunities regardless of any protected characteristic including: race, color, genetic information, creed, national origin, religion, sex, affectional or sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, lawful alien status, ancestry, age, marital status, protected veteran status or disability. Hiring decisions are based upon ADP’s operating needs, and applicant merit including, but not limited to, qualifications, experience, ability, availability, cooperation, and job performance.


**Ethics at ADP:** ADP has a long, proud history of conducting business with the highest ethical standards and full compliance with all applicable laws. We also expect our people to uphold our values with the highest level of integrity and behave in a manner that fosters an honest and respectful workplace. Click https://jobs.adp.com/life-at-adp/ to learn more about ADP’s culture and our full set of values.

title: Engineering Operations Technician , Data Center Engineering Operations
description:
**DESCRIPTION**
---------------


We are currently seeking a Data Center Engineering Operations Technician to serve as a technical resource within our mission critical Data Center’s in Vasteras. The position will help ensure overall availability and reliability to meet or exceed defined service levels of Data Center Engineering Operations. In this role you will have a positive involvement in both the maintenance of facilities and the improvement of efficiencies to help offer Amazon customer’s better value.  

  

AWS Infrastructure Services (AIS)  

  

AWS Infrastructure Services owns the design, planning, delivery, and operation of all AWS global infrastructure. In other words, we’re the people who keep the cloud running. We support all AWS data centers and all of the servers, storage, networking, power, and cooling equipment that ensure our customers have continual access to the innovation they rely on. We work on the most challenging problems, with thousands of variables impacting the supply chain — and we’re looking for talented people who want to help.
  

  

You’ll join a diverse team of software, hardware, and network engineers, supply chain specialists, security experts, operations managers, and other vital roles. You’ll collaborate with people across AWS to help us deliver the highest standards for safety and security while providing seemingly infinite capacity at the lowest possible cost for our customers. And you’ll experience an inclusive culture that welcomes bold ideas and empowers you to own them to completion.  

  

Key job responsibilities  

* Assisting in the operation and maintenance of all electrical, mechanical, fire/life safety equipment and HVAC equipment within the Data Center/Facility. This equipment supports mission-critical servers and must maintain better than 99.999% uptime.
* Assisting in the maintenance and monitoring of all Data Center systems to include incidents/events, problems, changes, monitoring, problem escalation/notification/resolution and all other aspects of Data Center support.
* Monitoring and troubleshooting all mechanical, electrical, HVAC systems, voice/data, cooling systems, fire/life safety equipment and generators.
* Providing assistance to contractor or data center engineers to ensure proper operation and maintenance of all facility equipment.
* Providing assistance to contractors or data center engineers to deploy new equipment, such as building racks, cabling, and other tasks as necessary.
* Performing site walk throughs to verify proper operation of Facility Equipment and Monitoring Systems. In addition to acting as a Facilities First Responder to critical events, you will be a part of the team supporting new data center facilities and existing data center facilities!

  

A day in the life  

* Monitoring of all alarms and systems involved in the operation of power, cooling and fire suppression systems in the data center.
* Planning and coordinating vendor works on site to ensure equipment is maintained and uptime retained.
* Supporting other sites and teams during events and planned works.
* Carrying out rack power up and installation duties.
* Monitoring and facilitating new equipment handover.
* Supporting new hires and team members through knowledge share and development.
* Event response and drill participation.

  

About the team  

  

Diverse Experiences  

AWS values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.  

  

Why AWS?  

Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.  

  

Inclusive Team Culture  

AWS values curiosity and connection. Our employee-led and company-sponsored affinity groups promote inclusion and empower our people to take pride in what makes us unique. Our inclusion events foster stronger, more collaborative teams. Our continual innovation is fueled by the bold ideas, fresh perspectives, and passionate voices our teams bring to everything we do.  

  

Mentorship & Career Growth  

We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge-sharing, mentorship and other career-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better-rounded professional.  

  

Work/Life Balance  

We value work-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why flexible work hours and arrangements are part of our culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve.**BASIC QUALIFICATIONS**
------------------------

* 2+ years electrical, mechanical and/or controls relevant experience (degree or trade qualification preferred)
* Demonstrate key electrical and mechanical competencies and theory
* Valid driving license

**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS**
----------------------------

* Experience in data center engineering
* Professional Certification in Electrical, Mechanical or Controls engineering.

  

Amazon is an equal opportunities employer. We believe passionately that employing a diverse workforce is central to our success. We make recruiting decisions based on your experience and skills. We value your passion to discover, invent, simplify and build. Protecting your privacy and the security of your data is a longstanding top priority for Amazon. Please consult our Privacy Notice (https://www.amazon.jobs/en/privacy\_page) to know more about how we collect, use and transfer the personal data of our candidates.  

  

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

title: Chief Technology Officer
description:
NovaBirth is a Stockholm-based MedTech startup developing an AI-powered ultrasound solution to objectively assess labour progression at the bedside. By applying AI to ultrasound imaging, we aim to provide a non-invasive alternative to the repeated manual vaginal examinations that are currently standard in maternity care.
 



 These examinations are typically performed every two to four hours throughout labour. They can be uncomfortable and stressful for women, carry a risk of infection, and are highly operator-dependent. NovaBirth aims to support existing ultrasound machines with AI-based analysis, enabling objective, contact-free intrapartum measurements directly at the bedside.
 



 Our goal is to assist doctors and midwives with more consistent and data-driven information during labour, while offering women a safer, more comfortable, and less invasive childbirth experience.
 



**Who We Are Looking For** 




 We are looking for someone who is excited to take ownership of the technical side of an early-stage MedTech startup. You should be comfortable working across the full development process, from machine learning research and prototyping to product engineering and deployment.
 



 The ideal person has strong experience in machine learning, preferably in computer vision or medical AI, and is motivated by building technology with direct patient impact. Since this is a founding role, we are looking for someone who is proactive, responsible, and comfortable with ambiguity. You do not need to have all the answers from the beginning, but you should be willing to learn quickly, make technical decisions, and build together with the team.
 



 Most importantly, we are looking for someone who genuinely cares about women’s health and wants to help bring more objective, respectful, and patient-centered technology into maternity care.
 



  





**Qualifications** 




**Required** 



* MSc or PhD in Computer Science, Engineering, Machine Learning, Medical AI, or a related field
* Hands-on experience with machine learning and AI development
* Experience with Python and deep learning frameworks such as PyTorch
* Experience in computer vision; medical imaging experience is highly preferred
* Ability or willingness to work across the full technical pipeline, including data processing, model training, evaluation, deployment, and software development
* Interest in full-stack development and building usable clinical software platforms
* Genuine interest in women’s health, healthcare innovation, and patient-centered technology
* Comfortable with the pace, uncertainty, and responsibility of an early-stage startup
* Strong communication skills and ability to work closely with clinical collaborators, researchers, and non-technical stakeholders



**Nice to Have** 



* Experience with medical AI, ultrasound imaging, or healthcare data
* Experience with cloud infrastructure or deployment tools, such as AWS
* Experience with full-stack development, for example Python-based backends and modern web frameworks
* Previous experience in MedTech, health tech, clinical research, or regulated software environments
* Understanding of medical device development, CE marking, data privacy, or clinical validation



  





**Compensation & Benefits** 



* Meaningful ownership stake, with details discussed at the offer stage
* Salary to be determined

title: Solution Sales Executive - Stockholm
description:
**Devoteam is a leading Google Cloud Partner, empowering businesses to harness the full potential of Google Cloud technologies.**
 With 20+ years of successful Google Cloud implementations and a team of certified experts, we drive digital transformation across various industries. We foster a culture of innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning, providing you with the tools and support you need to excel in your career.
   

  

 At Devoteam, we champion a revolutionary "New Way of Work" that prioritizes flexibility, personal growth, and joint success.
   

  

**Job Description**
**Accelerate Your Career: Solution Sales Executive - Google Cloud**
 Are you a seasoned sales professional with a passion for cloud technology and a proven track record of success in the IT consulting space? Devoteam is seeking a highly motivated Solution Sales Executive to join our expanding Google Cloud practice. In this role, you will drive new business acquisition and revenue growth by selling our comprehensive suite of Google Cloud consulting services and solutions, with a focus on professional services.
   

  

**What You'll Do:**
* Develop and execute a strategic sales plan: Target key accounts, identify opportunities, and build a strong pipeline to achieve ambitious quotas and revenue targets.
* Become a Trusted Advisor: Conduct in-depth needs assessments, understand client challenges, and position Devoteam as their go-to partner for Google Cloud solutions.
* Deliver Winning Presentations: Craft and deliver compelling sales presentations that showcase the value proposition of our Google Cloud offerings, emphasizing our expertise in professional services.
* Collaborate with Experts: Work closely with our technical consultants to design and propose tailored solutions that address client requirements, ensuring seamless project delivery.
* Negotiate and Close Deals: Secure favorable terms and conditions, maximizing revenue and profitability while building long-term client relationships.
* Stay Ahead of the Curve: Maintain a deep understanding of the evolving Google Cloud ecosystem, including new products, services, and market trends, to provide cutting-edge solutions.


**Qualifications**
**Proven Success:** 
 A demonstrable track record of exceeding sales targets in the IT consulting services industry, with experience selling technology solutions.
   

  

* Cloud Expertise: Strong understanding of cloud computing concepts, with specific knowledge of the Google Cloud Platform (GCP).
* Enterprise Focus: Experience selling to enterprise clients is highly desirable, with a proven ability to navigate complex sales cycles and build relationships with key decision-makers.
* Communication & Presentation Excellence: Exceptional communication, presentation, and interpersonal skills, with the ability to articulate complex technical concepts clearly and concisely.
* Negotiation & Closing Prowess: Strong negotiation and closing skills, with a proven ability to secure favorable deals.
* Team Player: Ability to work independently and as part of a collaborative team in a fast-paced environment.
* Education: Bachelor's degree in business, technology, or a related field.


**Additional Information**
 Devoteam is committed to creating a diverse and inclusive workplace where everyone feels valued and respected. We encourage applications from individuals with diverse backgrounds and experiences.
   

  

* Competitive Compensation: Enjoy a competitive compensation package with an uncapped commission structure, rewarding your hard work and success.
* Comprehensive Benefits: Benefit from comprehensive health insurance, a retirement plan, and generous paid time off.
* Growth Opportunities: Take advantage of excellent opportunities for professional development and career advancement within our growing Google Cloud practice.
* Cutting-Edge Technology: Work with the latest Google Cloud technologies and contribute to impactful projects that transform businesses.
* Dynamic Culture: Be part of a dynamic, supportive, and collaborative team culture that values innovation and personal growth.
* Flexible Work Arrangements: Enjoy flexible work arrangements that allow you to balance your professional and personal life.


**To Apply:**
**Please submit your resume and cover letter. We are excited to hear from you!**

title: Business Development Rep (AI Cloud)
description:
**About Featherless**
 Featherless.ai is building the world’s most reliable open-model inference platform — a serverless foundation for deploying and scaling AI without infrastructure overhead.
   

  

 Backed by
 **AMD, Airbus Ventures, 500 Global, Kickstart Ventures, HF0 Residency, Panache Ventures, and Oakseed Ventures** 
 , we’re a well-funded team of researchers and engineers on a mission to
 **democratize AI** 
 through performance and accessibility.
   

  

 Our cloud provides instant access to
 **30,000+ open-source AI models** 
 and the research innovations powering next-generation efficiency, reliability, and model optimization.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We’re looking for an experienced
 **Business Development Representative (AI Cloud)** 
 — someone technical that thrives at the intersection of AI, communication, and execution.
   

  

 This is
 *not* 
 a traditional sales role. You’re expected to be fluent in AI and be able to hold your own in conversations with model creators, AI startups, enterprises, and developers exploring open-model deployment.
   

  

 If you're a charismatic developer looking to expand into sales we want to speak to you.
   

  

 What You’ll Own Immediately
   

  

* Build & qualify pipeline across enterprises and AI startups
* Manage inbound requests through chat and email
* Manage outreach sequences and automations (HubSpot, Clay, Reply.io, n8n)
* Re-engage existing sign-ups and subscribers; identify high-value users
* Coordinate partner calls & discovery meetings with the CRO and founders
* Track CRM, pipeline metrics, and weekly reporting
* Attend events to generate pipeline and establish key relationships
* Propose creative GTM experiments and new partnership opportunities


 What You Bring
   

  

* 1–3 years in Cloud Infrastructure Sales or Developer Relations
* Comfortable engaging technical audiences (developers, founders, researchers)
* AI power user
* Excellent written and verbal communication in english — concise, credible, human
* Entrepreneurial and self-driven — you operate independently and get things done
* Familiar with HubSpot, Clay, n8n, or similar tools
* Bonus: Fluent in French or German


 Why Featherless
   

  

* Work directly with exec on high-impact partnerships and GTM strategy
* Build your network across one of the fastest-growing open AI ecosystems
* Be part of a small, high-performing team making open weight AI accessible to everyone

title: Senior Solution Consultant
description:
We are in Business for People, empowering people in service organisations with innovative Enterprise and Business software solutions. We’ve innovated and taken a new approach to delivering ERP that works for people. Self-driving, adaptive and intuitive software that is changing the way people work. Our solutions empower individuals and teams and deliver a better people experience so people can spend time on meaningful high value work they live for.
   

  





 Read more on our website about how we transform work and how people feel about it, so our customers and their people can thrive.
   

  

  

  




**Job Description**

**Our role in Solution Consulting is to partner with our customers to understand their strategic business and financial challenges, and to clearly articulate how Unit4’s solutions enable measurable, value‑driven outcomes.**




 To shape the right solution, you will lead in‑depth discovery and value‑based discussions, gaining a deep understanding of customers’ financial, operational, and organizational priorities. You will challenge perspectives when needed and act as the customer’s voice throughout the sales process.
   

  





 You will engage as a trusted advisor to senior stakeholders, including CFOs and finance leadership teams, helping them connect business strategy, financial governance, and transformation goals to long‑term value creation.
   

  





 Working closely with Account Executives as a strategic counterpart, you will shape deal strategy, build compelling business cases, and clearly communicate the financial and operational impact of Unit4’s world‑class solutions.
   

  





 As part of a modern and evolving buying journey, you will contribute to executive‑level presentations, solution workshops, and value‑focused demonstrations, ensuring clarity, relevance, and impact at every stage.
   

  

  

  




**Qualifications**

 You are likely to succeed in this role if you:
   

  




* Bring a strong academic foundation in Economics, Industrial Engineering and Management, Industrial Economics, or a related field.
* Have several years of senior professional experience in roles such as Controller, Finance Manager, Financial Analyst, or similar, with deep exposure to financial governance, business processes, systems, and executive stakeholders.
* Are comfortable engaging in strategic, value-based conversations with senior decision-makers, including CFOs and finance leadership, and can translate complex business challenges into clear, outcome-driven solutions.
* Have experience leading high-impact solution workshops, executive presentations, and demonstrations, with a strong focus on business value and long-term customer success
* Are passionate about solutions and value creation, and act as a trusted partner to Account Executives, shaping deal strategy, challenging assumptions, and clearly articulating the value of Unit4’s world-class solutions.
* Work confidently both independently and collaboratively, taking ownership at a senior level while contributing to a broader, cross-functional go-to-market team.
* Communicate with impact and credibility, and speak fluent Swedish and English, both spoken and written.


**Additional Information**

 Join Unit4 and be part of one of the most exciting journeys in the cloud ERP software space. We’re a fast-paced, high-growth, people-centric company, delivering enterprise software for a great people experience, and offering our own people a host of benefits and development opportunities. Grow with us At Unit4, we offer:
   

  




* A culture built on trust - giving you freedom and autonomy to be successful.
* Balance - with our uncapped time off policy, remote working opportunities and Global Wellbeing Days when the whole company can switch off and prioritize well-being.
* Talented colleagues, role models and mentors - work, learn and be inspired by some of the best talent in the software industry.
* Commitment to sustainability - with initiatives such as our Act4Good program, a way for everyone at Unit4 to come together and engage in actions that benefit society and the planet.
* A safe and inclusive working environment – supported by our Employee Resource Groups, which are open to all and include Women at Unit4, Pride at Unit4, Mental Health and Access at Unit4, and People of Color at Unit4.

title: Artificial Intelligence Engineer
description:
* Be hands-on in Python or TypeScript and comfortable building production grade backend systems
* Have solid experience with Docker and cloud deployment on AWS ECS Fargate S3 RDS Cognito
* Be capable of managing infrastructures code Terraform and CICD pipelines GitLab
